sys_update_xml.name: sys_ux_data_broker_transform_3a99781e9351c31051d7b1dcebba104b
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_ux_data_broker_transform"><sys_ux_data_broker_transform action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><acl_failure_result/><api_name>global.D3 Column Chart Data - Indicators</api_name><batch_exclude>false</batch_exclude><description/><mutates_server_data>false</mutates_server_data><name>D3 Column Chart Data - Indicators</name><output_schema/><private>false</private><props>[
  {
    "name": "mode",
    "label": "Mode",
    "description": "trend (per period, one series per indicator) | latest (one column per indicator) | breakdown (one column per breakdown element).",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": "trend"
  },
  {
    "name": "source",
    "label": "Source",
    "description": "auto (default) | scores | scorecard. 'scores' reads collected scores from pa_scores; 'scorecard' computes Formula/realtime indicators via the PA scorecard engine; 'auto' tries pa_scores then falls back to the scorecard engine.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": "auto"
  },
  {
    "name": "step",
    "label": "Step (scorecard period)",
    "description": "Optional period granularity when computing trends via the scorecard engine (e.g. day, week, month). Leave blank to use the indicator's default.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "indicators",
    "label": "Indicators (sys_ids or names)",
    "description": "Comma-separated indicator sys_ids or names. Used by 'trend' and 'latest' (each becomes a series / column).",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "indicator",
    "label": "Indicator (breakdown mode)",
    "description": "A single indicator sys_id or name to slice in 'breakdown' mode.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "breakdown",
    "label": "Breakdown (sys_id)",
    "description": "Breakdown sys_id (from pa_breakdowns) to slice by in 'breakdown' mode.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "lastPeriods",
    "label": "Last N periods (trend)",
    "description": "How many recent collection periods to show in 'trend' mode (ignored if From/To set).",
    "fieldType": "number",
    "defaultValue": 12
  },
  {
    "name": "from",
    "label": "From date (trend)",
    "description": "Optional start date (YYYY-MM-DD) for 'trend' mode; overrides Last N periods.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "to",
    "label": "To date (trend)",
    "description": "Optional end date (YYYY-MM-DD) for 'trend' mode.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "seriesName",
    "label": "Series name (latest/breakdown)",
    "description": "Name for the single series in 'latest' (default 'Latest') or 'breakdown' (default = indicator name).",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "colors",
    "label": "Colors (JSON)",
    "description": "Optional per-series colors: array [\"#2E93fA\",\"#66DA26\"] by order, or map {\"<series>\":\"#hex\"} by series name.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "maxCategories",
    "label": "Max categories (top-N)",
    "description": "Optional limit: keep only the top-N categories by total value. Blank = all.",
    "fieldType": "number"
  },
  {
    "name": "sort",
    "label": "Category sort",
    "description": "none (default — chronological for trend) | label-asc | label-desc | value-asc | value-desc.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": "none"
  },
  {
    "name": "dateField",
    "label": "Advanced: pa_scores date field",
    "description": "Override the pa_scores date column name (default 'date').",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": "date"
  },
  {
    "name": "valueField",
    "label": "Advanced: pa_scores value field",
    "description": "Override the pa_scores value column name (default 'value').",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": "value"
  },
  {
    "name": "breakdownField",
    "label": "Advanced: pa_scores breakdown field",
    "description": "Override the pa_scores breakdown column name (default 'breakdown').",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": "breakdown"
  },
  {
    "name": "elementField",
    "label": "Advanced: pa_scores element field",
    "description": "Override the pa_scores breakdown-element column name (default 'element').",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": "element"
  }
]
</props><required_translations/><schema_version>1.0.0</schema_version><script><![CDATA[function transform(input) {
	return new global.D3ChartData().fromIndicator(input);
}]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_ux_data_broker_transform</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-07 20:28:47</sys_created_on><sys_id>3a99781e9351c31051d7b1dcebba104b</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>D3 Column Chart Data - Indicators</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_ux_data_broker_transform_3a99781e9351c31051d7b1dcebba104b</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-07 20:28:47</sys_updated_on></sys_ux_data_broker_transform><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=3a99781e9351c31051d7b1dcebba104b"/></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_include_d8abf7ee932dc35051d7b1dcebba100d
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>package_private</access><active>true</active><api_name>global.D3ScatterData</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>D3ScatterData</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[/**
 * D3ScatterData — Script Include (global, accessible from all application scopes)
 * ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 * Reusable transform that turns platform data into the JSON shape expected by
 * the x-1295779-scatter-chart-uic component's "Data · Series data" property:
 *
 *   [ { name: "<series>", color?: "#hex",
 *       data: [ { x, y, r?, label? }, ... ] }, ... ]
 *
 * NOTE on the data shape: this differs from the D3 Line/Column charts. Those
 * charts use { label, value } points (one categorical axis + one value axis).
 * The SCATTER chart uses { x, y } points with BOTH axes continuous, plus an
 * optional `r` (a 3rd dimension mapped to bubble radius) and an optional `label`
 * (the point identity, surfaced in the tooltip + click events). So this Script
 * Include is a SEPARATE one from D3ChartData — it emits x/y points, not
 * label/value points.
 *
 * Two entry points:
 *   - fromRows(rows, cfg)   : reshape an array of already-fetched plain objects
 *                             (e.g. a "Look up records" data resource output)
 *                             into scatter series, grouping by an optional
 *                             series field.
 *   - fromAggregate(cfg)    : GlideAggregate producing one x/y point per group
 *                             (e.g. count vs avg(value) per category), optionally
 *                             split into series by a second field. Best-effort.
 *
 * Written in ES5 for broad scoped/global compatibility (no let/const/arrow funcs
 * or template literals).
 */
var D3ScatterData = Class.create();
D3ScatterData.prototype = {

	initialize: function () {},

	/**
	 * Reshape an array of plain objects into scatter series JSON.
	 * cfg: {
	 *   xField   (required) : the numeric/date x value source
	 *   yField   (required) : the numeric y value source
	 *   rField?            : the bubble radius value source (omit for no bubbles)
	 *   seriesField?       : split rows into multiple series by this field
	 *   labelField?        : per-point label/identity (defaults to xField)
	 *   seriesName?        : series name when no seriesField (default 'Series 1')
	 *   colors?            : array ["#..", ..] or map { "<series>": "#.." }
	 *   xIsDate?           : when true, pass x through as a date string (Time axis)
	 * }
	 */
	fromRows: function (rows, cfg) {
		cfg = cfg || {};
		rows = rows || [];
		var xField = this._str(cfg.xField);
		var yField = this._str(cfg.yField);
		if (!xField || !yField) {
			return [];
		}
		var rField = this._str(cfg.rField);
		var seriesField = this._str(cfg.seriesField);
		var labelField = this._str(cfg.labelField) || xField;
		var defaultSeriesName = this._str(cfg.seriesName) || 'Series 1';
		var xIsDate = cfg.xIsDate === true || cfg.xIsDate === 'true';

		var seriesOrder = [];
		var seriesSeen = {};
		var buckets = {};

		for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
			var row = rows[i] || {};
			var xRaw = this._readField(row, xField);
			var yNum = parseFloat(this._readField(row, yField));
			if (isNaN(yNum)) {
				continue;
			}
			var point = { y: yNum };
			point.x = xIsDate ? this._dateStr(xRaw) : this._numOrNull(xRaw);
			if (point.x === null) {
				continue;
			}
			if (rField) {
				var rNum = parseFloat(this._readField(row, rField));
				if (!isNaN(rNum)) {
					point.r = rNum;
				}
			}
			if (labelField) {
				var lbl = this._readField(row, labelField);
				if (lbl !== '' && lbl !== null && lbl !== undefined) {
					point.label = '' + lbl;
				}
			}

			var sLabel = seriesField ? this._readField(row, seriesField) : defaultSeriesName;
			sLabel = this._blank(sLabel) === '(empty)' ? defaultSeriesName : this._blank(sLabel);
			if (!seriesSeen[sLabel]) {
				seriesSeen[sLabel] = true;
				seriesOrder.push(sLabel);
				buckets[sLabel] = [];
			}
			buckets[sLabel].push(point);
		}

		return this._assemble(seriesOrder, buckets, cfg);
	},

	/**
	 * Aggregate a table into scatter series — one x/y point per group, where x and
	 * y come from two different aggregates over a grouping field. Best-effort:
	 * GlideAggregate exposes one aggregate per (group) row, so we run it grouped by
	 * `groupField` (and optional `seriesField`) and read both the X aggregate and
	 * the Y aggregate per group.
	 *
	 * cfg: {
	 *   table       (required)
	 *   filter?                : encoded query
	 *   groupField  (required) : field whose distinct values become the points
	 *   seriesField?           : optional second group field -> multiple series
	 *   xMetric     (default 'count') : count | sum | avg | min | max
	 *   xField?                : numeric field for xMetric (required if xMetric!=count)
	 *   yMetric     (default 'avg')   : count | sum | avg | min | max
	 *   yField?                : numeric field for yMetric (required if yMetric!=count)
	 *   rMetric?               : optional bubble metric (count|sum|avg|min|max)
	 *   rField?                : numeric field for rMetric
	 *   useDisplayValue (default true) : label points by group display value
	 *   colors?                : array or { "<series>": "#.." } map
	 * }
	 */
	fromAggregate: function (cfg) {
		cfg = cfg || {};
		var table = this._str(cfg.table);
		var groupField = this._str(cfg.groupField);
		if (!table || !groupField) {
			return [];
		}
		var seriesField = this._str(cfg.seriesField);
		var xMetric = (this._str(cfg.xMetric) || 'count').toLowerCase();
		var yMetric = (this._str(cfg.yMetric) || 'avg').toLowerCase();
		var rMetric = (this._str(cfg.rMetric) || '').toLowerCase();
		var xField = this._str(cfg.xField);
		var yField = this._str(cfg.yField);
		var rField = this._str(cfg.rField);
		var useDisplay = cfg.useDisplayValue !== false && cfg.useDisplayValue !== 'false';

		if (xMetric !== 'count' && !xField) { return []; }
		if (yMetric !== 'count' && !yField) { return []; }
		if (rMetric && rMetric !== 'count' && !rField) { rMetric = ''; }

		var ga = new GlideAggregate(table);
		if (this._str(cfg.filter)) {
			ga.addEncodedQuery(cfg.filter);
		}
		ga.groupBy(groupField);
		if (seriesField) {
			ga.groupBy(seriesField);
		}
		this._addMetric(ga, xMetric, xField);
		this._addMetric(ga, yMetric, yField);
		if (rMetric) {
			this._addMetric(ga, rMetric, rField);
		}
		ga.orderBy(groupField);
		ga.query();

		var defaultSeriesName = this._str(cfg.seriesName) || 'Series 1';
		var seriesOrder = [];
		var seriesSeen = {};
		var buckets = {};

		while (ga.next()) {
			var label = useDisplay ? ga.getDisplayValue(groupField) : ga.getValue(groupField);
			var xVal = this._getMetric(ga, xMetric, xField);
			var yVal = this._getMetric(ga, yMetric, yField);
			if (isNaN(xVal) || isNaN(yVal)) {
				continue;
			}
			var point = { x: xVal, y: yVal };
			if (label !== '' && label !== null && label !== undefined) {
				point.label = '' + label;
			}
			if (rMetric) {
				var rVal = this._getMetric(ga, rMetric, rField);
				if (!isNaN(rVal)) {
					point.r = rVal;
				}
			}

			var sLabel = defaultSeriesName;
			if (seriesField) {
				sLabel = useDisplay ? ga.getDisplayValue(seriesField) : ga.getValue(seriesField);
			}
			sLabel = this._blank(sLabel) === '(empty)' ? defaultSeriesName : this._blank(sLabel);
			if (!seriesSeen[sLabel]) {
				seriesSeen[sLabel] = true;
				seriesOrder.push(sLabel);
				buckets[sLabel] = [];
			}
			buckets[sLabel].push(point);
		}

		return this._assemble(seriesOrder, buckets, cfg);
	},

	// ----- internals -------------------------------------------------------

	_addMetric: function (ga, metric, field) {
		if (metric === 'count') {
			ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
		} else {
			ga.addAggregate(metric.toUpperCase(), field);
		}
	},

	_getMetric: function (ga, metric, field) {
		var v;
		if (metric === 'count') {
			v = parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT'), 10);
		} else {
			v = parseFloat(ga.getAggregate(metric.toUpperCase(), field));
		}
		return v;
	},

	_assemble: function (seriesOrder, buckets, cfg) {
		var parsedColors = this._parseColors(cfg.colors);
		var out = [];
		for (var k = 0; k < seriesOrder.length; k++) {
			var sLabel = seriesOrder[k];
			var entry = { name: String(sLabel), data: buckets[sLabel] };
			var color = this._colorFor(parsedColors, sLabel, k);
			if (color) {
				entry.color = color;
			}
			out.push(entry);
		}
		return out;
	},

	_numOrNull: function (raw) {
		if (raw === undefined || raw === null || raw === '') { return null; }
		var n = parseFloat(raw);
		return isNaN(n) ? null : n;
	},

	_dateStr: function (raw) {
		if (raw === undefined || raw === null || raw === '') { return null; }
		// pass through a date string; the component parses ISO/date strings.
		// GlideDateTime-ish strings ("2025-01-01 00:00:00") parse fine client-side.
		return '' + raw;
	},

	_parseColors: function (colors) {
		if (!colors) { return null; }
		if (typeof colors === 'string') {
			var s = colors.replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, '');
			if (!s) { return null; }
			try {
				colors = JSON.parse(s);
			} catch (e) {
				colors = s.split(',');
				for (var i = 0; i < colors.length; i++) {
					colors[i] = colors[i].replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, '');
				}
			}
		}
		if (Object.prototype.toString.call(colors) === '[object Array]') {
			return { type: 'array', value: colors };
		}
		if (typeof colors === 'object') {
			return { type: 'map', value: colors };
		}
		return null;
	},

	_colorFor: function (parsed, label, index) {
		if (!parsed) { return null; }
		if (parsed.type === 'array') {
			if (!parsed.value.length) { return null; }
			return parsed.value[index % parsed.value.length];
		}
		if (parsed.type === 'map') {
			return parsed.value[label] || null;
		}
		return null;
	},

	_readField: function (obj, field) {
		if (!field) { return ''; }
		var v = obj[field];
		if (v && typeof v === 'object') {
			if (typeof v.getDisplayValue === 'function') { return v.getDisplayValue(); }
			if (v.displayValue !== undefined) { return v.displayValue; }
			if (v.value !== undefined) { return v.value; }
		}
		return (v === undefined || v === null) ? '' : v;
	},

	_str: function (v) {
		return (v === undefined || v === null) ? '' : ('' + v).replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, '');
	},

	_blank: function (v) {
		var s = (v === undefined || v === null) ? '' : ('' + v);
		return s === '' ? '(empty)' : s;
	},

	type: 'D3ScatterData'
};
]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-21 15:30:40</sys_created_on><sys_id>d8abf7ee932dc35051d7b1dcebba100d</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>D3ScatterData</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_d8abf7ee932dc35051d7b1dcebba100d</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-21 15:30:40</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_include_a9487726932dc35051d7b1dcebba109e
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>package_private</access><active>true</active><api_name>global.D3MatrixData</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>D3MatrixData</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[/**
 * D3MatrixData -- Script Include (global, accessible from all application scopes)
 * ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 * Reusable transform that turns platform data into the JSON shape expected by
 * the x-1295779-heatmap-chart-uic component's "Data . Cells" property:
 *
 *   [ { x: "<column>", y: "<row>", value: <number> }, ... ]
 *
 * This is DIFFERENT from the D3MatrixData "series" contract used by the line and
 * column charts: there is NO per-series array and NO { label, value } points.
 * Instead the heatmap groups by TWO category fields (an X/column field and a
 * Y/row field) to produce a flat list of CELLS, and the cell's numeric `value`
 * is mapped to a COLOR by the component (not to a bar/line height).
 *
 * Two entry points:
 *   - fromAggregate(cfg)  : server-side GlideAggregate grouped by xField AND
 *                           yField with a metric (count/sum/avg/min/max).
 *   - fromRows(rows, cfg) : reshape an array of already-fetched plain objects
 *                           into cells (xField/yField/valueField, dup-combine).
 *
 * Written in ES5 for broad scoped/global compatibility (no let/const/arrow
 * functions/template literals).
 */
var D3MatrixData = Class.create();
D3MatrixData.prototype = {

	initialize: function () {},

	/**
	 * Aggregate a table into heatmap cells.
	 * cfg: {
	 *   table, filter,
	 *   xField (column category), yField (row category),
	 *   metric (count|sum|avg|min|max), valueField (required if metric != count),
	 *   useDisplayValue (default true), sortX?, sortY?
	 *   (colorMin/colorMax are accepted but ignored -- the component handles color)
	 * }
	 */
	fromAggregate: function (cfg) {
		cfg = cfg || {};
		var table = this._str(cfg.table);
		var xField = this._str(cfg.xField);
		var yField = this._str(cfg.yField);
		if (!table || !xField || !yField) {
			return [];
		}
		var metric = (this._str(cfg.metric) || 'count').toLowerCase();
		var valueField = this._str(cfg.valueField);
		var useDisplay = cfg.useDisplayValue !== false && cfg.useDisplayValue !== 'false';
		if (metric !== 'count' && !valueField) {
			return []; // sum/avg/min/max need a numeric field
		}

		var ga = new GlideAggregate(table);
		if (this._str(cfg.filter)) {
			ga.addEncodedQuery(cfg.filter);
		}
		ga.groupBy(xField);
		ga.groupBy(yField);
		if (metric === 'count') {
			ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
		} else {
			ga.addAggregate(metric.toUpperCase(), valueField);
		}
		ga.orderBy(xField);
		ga.orderBy(yField);
		ga.query();

		var rows = [];
		while (ga.next()) {
			var xLabel = useDisplay ? ga.getDisplayValue(xField) : ga.getValue(xField);
			var yLabel = useDisplay ? ga.getDisplayValue(yField) : ga.getValue(yField);
			var value;
			if (metric === 'count') {
				value = parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT'), 10);
			} else {
				value = parseFloat(ga.getAggregate(metric.toUpperCase(), valueField));
			}
			rows.push({
				x: this._blank(xLabel),
				y: this._blank(yLabel),
				value: isNaN(value) ? 0 : value
			});
		}
		return this._buildCells(rows, cfg, null);
	},

	/**
	 * Reshape an array of plain objects into heatmap cells.
	 * cfg: { xField, yField, valueField, metric? (dup-combine: sum|avg|min|max,
	 *        default sum), sortX?, sortY? }
	 */
	fromRows: function (rows, cfg) {
		cfg = cfg || {};
		rows = rows || [];
		var xField = this._str(cfg.xField);
		var yField = this._str(cfg.yField);
		var valueField = this._str(cfg.valueField);

		var collected = [];
		for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
			var r = rows[i] || {};
			var value = parseFloat(this._readField(r, valueField));
			collected.push({
				x: this._blank(this._readField(r, xField)),
				y: this._blank(this._readField(r, yField)),
				value: isNaN(value) ? 0 : value
			});
		}
		return this._buildCells(collected, cfg, (this._str(cfg.metric) || 'sum').toLowerCase());
	},

	// ----- internals -------------------------------------------------------

	/**
	 * Build the flat cell array from rows {x, y, value}, combining duplicates
	 * with dupMetric (null = assume unique; otherwise sum|avg|min|max), then
	 * apply optional sortX / sortY ordering of the categories.
	 */
	_buildCells: function (rows, cfg, dupMetric) {
		var xOrder = [];
		var yOrder = [];
		var xSeen = {};
		var ySeen = {};
		var bucket = {};   // "x y" -> value
		var counts = {};   // "x y" -> count (for avg)

		for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
			var row = rows[i];
			if (!xSeen[row.x]) { xSeen[row.x] = true; xOrder.push(row.x); }
			if (!ySeen[row.y]) { ySeen[row.y] = true; yOrder.push(row.y); }
			var key = row.x + ' ' + row.y;
			if (bucket[key] === undefined) {
				bucket[key] = row.value;
				counts[key] = 1;
			} else {
				var m = dupMetric || 'sum';
				if (m === 'min') { bucket[key] = Math.min(bucket[key], row.value); }
				else if (m === 'max') { bucket[key] = Math.max(bucket[key], row.value); }
				else { bucket[key] += row.value; }
				counts[key]++;
			}
		}
		if (dupMetric === 'avg') {
			for (var k in bucket) {
				if (bucket.hasOwnProperty(k)) { bucket[k] = bucket[k] / counts[k]; }
			}
		}

		this._sortCategories(xOrder, 'x', bucket, this._str(cfg.sortX));
		this._sortCategories(yOrder, 'y', bucket, this._str(cfg.sortY));

		var out = [];
		for (var yi = 0; yi < yOrder.length; yi++) {
			for (var xi = 0; xi < xOrder.length; xi++) {
				var bk = xOrder[xi] + ' ' + yOrder[yi];
				if (bucket[bk] !== undefined) {
					out.push({ x: String(xOrder[xi]), y: String(yOrder[yi]), value: bucket[bk] });
				}
			}
		}
		return out;
	},

	/**
	 * Sort a category list in place. mode: none|asc|desc|value.
	 * 'value' ranks by the category's total value across the other axis (desc).
	 */
	_sortCategories: function (cats, axis, bucket, mode) {
		mode = (mode || '').toLowerCase();
		if (!mode || mode === 'none') { return; }
		if (mode === 'value') {
			var totals = {};
			for (var c = 0; c < cats.length; c++) { totals[cats[c]] = 0; }
			for (var key in bucket) {
				if (!bucket.hasOwnProperty(key)) { continue; }
				var parts = key.split(' ');
				var cat = (axis === 'x') ? parts[0] : parts[1];
				if (totals[cat] !== undefined) { totals[cat] += bucket[key]; }
			}
			cats.sort(function (a, b) { return totals[b] - totals[a]; });
		} else {
			cats.sort(function (a, b) { return a < b ? -1 : (a > b ? 1 : 0); });
			if (mode === 'desc') { cats.reverse(); }
		}
	},

	_readField: function (obj, field) {
		if (!field) { return ''; }
		var v = obj[field];
		if (v && typeof v === 'object') {
			if (typeof v.getDisplayValue === 'function') { return v.getDisplayValue(); }
			if (v.displayValue !== undefined) { return v.displayValue; }
			if (v.value !== undefined) { return v.value; }
		}
		return (v === undefined || v === null) ? '' : v;
	},

	_str: function (v) {
		return (v === undefined || v === null) ? '' : ('' + v).replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, '');
	},

	_blank: function (v) {
		var s = (v === undefined || v === null) ? '' : ('' + v);
		return s === '' ? '(empty)' : s;
	},

	type: 'D3MatrixData'
};
]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-21 15:16:00</sys_created_on><sys_id>a9487726932dc35051d7b1dcebba109e</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>D3MatrixData</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_a9487726932dc35051d7b1dcebba109e</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-21 15:16:00</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_include_8377289693dd831051d7b1dcebba10f7
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>package_private</access><active>true</active><api_name>global.D3ChartData</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>D3ChartData</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[/**
 * D3ChartData — Script Include (global, accessible from all application scopes)
 * ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 * Reusable transform that turns platform data into the JSON shape expected by
 * the x-1295779-line-chart-uic component's "Data · Series data" property:
 *
 *   [ { name: "<series>", color?: "#hex", data: [ { label, value, x? }, ... ] }, ... ]
 *
 * This is the SAME contract used by the D3 Column Chart — the line chart is a
 * drop-in for that data. If you already created a global `D3ChartData` Script
 * Include for the column chart, this file is a backward-compatible SUPERSET of
 * it: behavior is identical unless you set the new `xAxis` input. So you can
 * reuse one Script Include for both components (just paste this version over the
 * old one — nothing the column chart relies on changes).
 *
 * The only addition for the line chart: when `xAxis` is 'linear' or 'time',
 * each data point also gets an `x` value (the raw category value — a number or
 * a date string), which the line chart uses for a true continuous/time x-axis.
 * With the default `xAxis` = 'category' (or omitted), no `x` is emitted and the
 * output is byte-for-byte identical to the column chart's.
 *
 * Two table entry points + one Performance Analytics entry point:
 *   - fromAggregate(cfg)  : server-side GlideAggregate (count/sum/avg/min/max).
 *   - fromRows(rows, cfg) : reshape an array of already-fetched plain objects.
 *   - fromIndicator(cfg)  : Performance/Platform Analytics indicator scores.
 *
 * Written in ES5 for broad scoped/global compatibility.
 */
var D3ChartData = Class.create();
D3ChartData.prototype = {

	initialize: function () {},

	/**
	 * Aggregate a table into series JSON.
	 * cfg: {
	 *   table, filter, categoryField, seriesField?, metric (count|sum|avg|min|max),
	 *   valueField (required if metric!=count), seriesName?, useDisplayValue (default true),
	 *   colors, maxCategories?, sort?, xAxis? (category|linear|time)
	 * }
	 */
	fromAggregate: function (cfg) {
		cfg = cfg || {};
		var table = this._str(cfg.table);
		var categoryField = this._str(cfg.categoryField);
		if (!table || !categoryField) {
			return [];
		}
		var seriesField = this._str(cfg.seriesField);
		var metric = (this._str(cfg.metric) || 'count').toLowerCase();
		var valueField = this._str(cfg.valueField);
		var useDisplay = cfg.useDisplayValue !== false && cfg.useDisplayValue !== 'false';
		if (metric !== 'count' && !valueField) {
			return []; // sum/avg/min/max need a numeric field
		}

		var ga = new GlideAggregate(table);
		if (this._str(cfg.filter)) {
			ga.addEncodedQuery(cfg.filter);
		}
		ga.groupBy(categoryField);
		if (seriesField) {
			ga.groupBy(seriesField);
		}
		if (metric === 'count') {
			ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
		} else {
			ga.addAggregate(metric.toUpperCase(), valueField);
		}
		// keep a stable category order; helps line/time charts read chronologically
		ga.orderBy(categoryField);
		ga.query();

		var defaultSeriesName = this._str(cfg.seriesName) || this._metricLabel(metric, valueField);
		var rows = [];
		while (ga.next()) {
			var catLabel = useDisplay ? ga.getDisplayValue(categoryField) : ga.getValue(categoryField);
			var catRaw = ga.getValue(categoryField); // raw value powers the numeric/time x
			var seriesLabel = defaultSeriesName;
			if (seriesField) {
				seriesLabel = useDisplay ? ga.getDisplayValue(seriesField) : ga.getValue(seriesField);
			}
			var value;
			if (metric === 'count') {
				value = parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT'), 10);
			} else {
				value = parseFloat(ga.getAggregate(metric.toUpperCase(), valueField));
			}
			rows.push({
				catLabel: this._blank(catLabel),
				xRaw: catRaw,
				seriesLabel: this._blank(seriesLabel) === '(empty)' ? 'Value' : this._blank(seriesLabel),
				value: isNaN(value) ? 0 : value
			});
		}
		return this._buildSeries(rows, cfg, null);
	},

	/**
	 * Reshape an array of plain objects into series JSON.
	 * cfg: { categoryField, seriesField?, valueField, seriesName?, metric?, colors,
	 *        xField? (raw x source; defaults to categoryField), xAxis? }
	 */
	fromRows: function (rows, cfg) {
		cfg = cfg || {};
		rows = rows || [];
		var categoryField = this._str(cfg.categoryField);
		var seriesField = this._str(cfg.seriesField);
		var valueField = this._str(cfg.valueField);
		var xField = this._str(cfg.xField) || categoryField;
		var defaultSeriesName = this._str(cfg.seriesName) || 'Value';

		var collected = [];
		for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
			var r = rows[i] || {};
			var catLabel = this._readField(r, categoryField);
			var seriesLabel = seriesField ? this._readField(r, seriesField) : defaultSeriesName;
			var value = parseFloat(this._readField(r, valueField));
			collected.push({
				catLabel: this._blank(catLabel),
				xRaw: this._readField(r, xField),
				seriesLabel: this._blank(seriesLabel) === '(empty)' ? 'Value' : this._blank(seriesLabel),
				value: isNaN(value) ? 0 : value
			});
		}
		return this._buildSeries(collected, cfg, (this._str(cfg.metric) || 'sum').toLowerCase());
	},

	/**
	 * Build series JSON from Performance/Platform Analytics indicator scores.
	 * cfg.mode: 'trend' (default) | 'latest' | 'breakdown'. See the column chart
	 * README for the full input reference. For a line chart, 'trend' with
	 * xAxis = 'time' gives a true time series. cfg keys unchanged from the column
	 * chart plus the optional `xAxis`.
	 */
	fromIndicator: function (cfg) {
		cfg = cfg || {};
		var mode = (this._str(cfg.mode) || 'trend').toLowerCase();
		if (mode === 'latest') { return this._indicatorLatest(cfg); }
		if (mode === 'breakdown') { return this._indicatorBreakdown(cfg); }
		return this._indicatorTrend(cfg);
	},

	// ----- Performance Analytics internals --------------------------------

	_paFields: function (cfg) {
		return {
			date: this._str(cfg.dateField) || 'date',
			value: this._str(cfg.valueField) || 'value',
			breakdown: this._str(cfg.breakdownField) || 'breakdown',
			element: this._str(cfg.elementField) || 'element'
		};
	},

	_resolveIndicator: function (idOrName) {
		idOrName = this._str(idOrName);
		if (!idOrName) { return null; }
		var gr = new GlideRecord('pa_indicators');
		if (/^[0-9a-f]{32}$/i.test(idOrName)) {
			if (gr.get(idOrName)) { return { sysId: gr.getUniqueValue(), name: gr.getValue('name') }; }
			return { sysId: idOrName, name: idOrName };
		}
		gr.addQuery('name', idOrName);
		gr.setLimit(1);
		gr.query();
		if (gr.next()) { return { sysId: gr.getUniqueValue(), name: gr.getValue('name') }; }
		return null;
	},

	_resolveIndicatorList: function (val) {
		var out = [];
		if (!val) { return out; }
		var arr = (Object.prototype.toString.call(val) === '[object Array]') ? val : ('' + val).split(',');
		for (var i = 0; i < arr.length; i++) {
			var token = this._str(arr[i]);
			if (!token) { continue; }
			var r = this._resolveIndicator(token);
			if (r) { out.push(r); }
		}
		return out;
	},

	_source: function (cfg) {
		var s = (this._str(cfg.source) || 'auto').toLowerCase();
		return (s === 'scores' || s === 'scorecard') ? s : 'auto';
	},

	_scNum: function (sc) {
		var v;
		try { v = sc.getScore(); } catch (e) { v = undefined; }
		if (v === undefined || v === null || v === '' || isNaN(parseFloat(v))) {
			try { v = sc.getValue(); } catch (e2) { v = undefined; }
		}
		v = parseFloat(v);
		return isNaN(v) ? 0 : v;
	},

	_scDate: function (sc) {
		var d = '';
		try { d = sc.getStart(); } catch (e) { d = ''; }
		d = (d === null || d === undefined) ? '' : ('' + d);
		if (d.indexOf(' ') > -1) { d = d.split(' ')[0]; }
		return d || '(period)';
	},

	_indicatorTrend: function (cfg) {
		var inds = this._resolveIndicatorList(cfg.indicators || cfg.indicator);
		var rows = [];
		for (var i = 0; i < inds.length; i++) {
			var ind = inds[i];
			var pts = this._trendRows(ind, cfg);
			for (var t = 0; t < pts.length; t++) {
				rows.push({ catLabel: this._blank(pts[t].label), xRaw: pts[t].label, seriesLabel: ind.name, value: pts[t].value });
			}
		}
		return this._buildSeries(rows, cfg, null);
	},

	_trendRows: function (ind, cfg) {
		var src = this._source(cfg);
		var pts = [];
		if (src !== 'scorecard') { pts = this._scoresTrend(ind, cfg); }
		if (src === 'scorecard' || (src === 'auto' && !pts.length)) { pts = this._scorecardTrend(ind, cfg); }
		return pts;
	},

	_scoresTrend: function (ind, cfg) {
		var f = this._paFields(cfg);
		var lastPeriods = parseInt(cfg.lastPeriods, 10);
		if (isNaN(lastPeriods) || lastPeriods <= 0) { lastPeriods = 12; }
		var from = this._str(cfg.from);
		var to = this._str(cfg.to);
		var gr = new GlideRecord('pa_scores');
		gr.addQuery('indicator', ind.sysId);
		gr.addNullQuery(f.breakdown);
		if (from) { gr.addQuery(f.date, '>=', from); }
		if (to) { gr.addQuery(f.date, '<=', to); }
		if (from || to) { gr.orderBy(f.date); } else { gr.orderByDesc(f.date); gr.setLimit(lastPeriods); }
		gr.query();
		var temp = [];
		while (gr.next()) {
			var v = parseFloat(gr.getValue(f.value));
			temp.push({ label: gr.getDisplayValue(f.date), value: isNaN(v) ? 0 : v });
		}
		if (!(from || to)) { temp.reverse(); }
		return temp;
	},

	_scorecardTrend: function (ind, cfg) {
		var out = [];
		var from = this._str(cfg.from);
		var to = this._str(cfg.to);
		try {
			var sc = new PAScorecard();
			sc.addParam('uuid', ind.sysId);
			sc.addParam('display_value', 'true');
			var step = this._str(cfg.step);
			if (step) { sc.addParam('step', step); }
			if (from) { sc.addParam('from', from); }
			if (to) { sc.addParam('to', to); }
			sc.query();
			while (sc.hasNext()) {
				sc.next();
				out.push({ label: this._scDate(sc), value: this._scNum(sc) });
			}
		} catch (e) {
			return [];
		}
		var lastPeriods = parseInt(cfg.lastPeriods, 10);
		if (!from && !to && !isNaN(lastPeriods) && lastPeriods > 0 && out.length > lastPeriods) {
			out = out.slice(out.length - lastPeriods);
		}
		return out;
	},

	_indicatorLatest: function (cfg) {
		var inds = this._resolveIndicatorList(cfg.indicators || cfg.indicator);
		var seriesName = this._str(cfg.seriesName) || 'Latest';
		var rows = [];
		for (var i = 0; i < inds.length; i++) {
			var ind = inds[i];
			rows.push({ catLabel: ind.name, xRaw: ind.name, seriesLabel: seriesName, value: this._latestValue(ind, cfg) });
		}
		return this._buildSeries(rows, cfg, null);
	},

	_latestValue: function (ind, cfg) {
		var src = this._source(cfg);
		var v = null;
		if (src !== 'scorecard') { v = this._scoresLatest(ind, cfg); }
		if (src === 'scorecard' || (src === 'auto' && v === null)) { v = this._scorecardLatest(ind, cfg); }
		return (v === null || isNaN(v)) ? 0 : v;
	},

	_scoresLatest: function (ind, cfg) {
		var f = this._paFields(cfg);
		var gr = new GlideRecord('pa_scores');
		gr.addQuery('indicator', ind.sysId);
		gr.addNullQuery(f.breakdown);
		gr.orderByDesc(f.date);
		gr.setLimit(1);
		gr.query();
		if (gr.next()) { var v = parseFloat(gr.getValue(f.value)); return isNaN(v) ? 0 : v; }
		return null;
	},

	_scorecardLatest: function (ind, cfg) {
		var pts = this._scorecardTrend(ind, cfg);
		if (!pts.length) { return null; }
		return pts[pts.length - 1].value;
	},

	_indicatorBreakdown: function (cfg) {
		var ind = this._resolveIndicator(cfg.indicator || cfg.indicators);
		var breakdown = this._str(cfg.breakdown);
		if (!ind || !breakdown) { return []; }
		var seriesName = this._str(cfg.seriesName) || ind.name;
		var src = this._source(cfg);
		var pts = [];
		if (src !== 'scorecard') { pts = this._scoresBreakdown(ind, breakdown, cfg); }
		if (src === 'scorecard' || (src === 'auto' && !pts.length)) { pts = this._scorecardBreakdown(ind, breakdown, cfg); }
		var rows = [];
		for (var i = 0; i < pts.length; i++) {
			rows.push({ catLabel: this._blank(pts[i].label), xRaw: pts[i].label, seriesLabel: seriesName, value: pts[i].value });
		}
		return this._buildSeries(rows, cfg, null);
	},

	_scoresBreakdown: function (ind, breakdown, cfg) {
		var f = this._paFields(cfg);
		var latest = '';
		var g1 = new GlideRecord('pa_scores');
		g1.addQuery('indicator', ind.sysId);
		g1.addQuery(f.breakdown, breakdown);
		g1.orderByDesc(f.date);
		g1.setLimit(1);
		g1.query();
		if (g1.next()) { latest = g1.getValue(f.date); }
		if (!latest) { return []; }
		var out = [];
		var gr = new GlideRecord('pa_scores');
		gr.addQuery('indicator', ind.sysId);
		gr.addQuery(f.breakdown, breakdown);
		gr.addQuery(f.date, latest);
		gr.query();
		while (gr.next()) {
			var v = parseFloat(gr.getValue(f.value));
			out.push({ label: gr.getDisplayValue(f.element), value: isNaN(v) ? 0 : v });
		}
		return out;
	},

	_scorecardBreakdown: function (ind, breakdown, cfg) {
		var out = [];
		try {
			var sc = new PAScorecard();
			sc.addParam('uuid', ind.sysId);
			sc.addParam('breakdown', breakdown);
			sc.addParam('display_value', 'true');
			var ef = this._str(cfg.elementsFilter);
			if (ef) { sc.addParam('elements_filter', ef); }
			sc.query();
			while (sc.hasNext()) {
				sc.next();
				var label = '';
				try { label = sc.getLabel(); } catch (e) { try { label = sc.getDisplayValue(); } catch (e2) { label = ''; } }
				out.push({ label: (label === null || label === undefined || label === '') ? '(element)' : ('' + label), value: this._scNum(sc) });
			}
		} catch (e3) {
			return [];
		}
		return out;
	},

	// ----- internals -------------------------------------------------------

	/**
	 * Build the ordered series array from flat rows {catLabel, xRaw, seriesLabel, value}.
	 * dupMetric: how to combine duplicate (series,category) pairs (null = assume unique).
	 * Emits a per-point `x` when cfg.xAxis is 'linear' or 'time'.
	 */
	_buildSeries: function (rows, cfg, dupMetric) {
		var xAxis = (this._str(cfg.xAxis) || 'category').toLowerCase();
		var emitX = (xAxis === 'linear' || xAxis === 'time');

		var categories = [];
		var catSeen = {};
		var catX = {};      // catLabel -> raw x value (first seen)
		var seriesOrder = [];
		var seriesSeen = {};
		var cells = {};
		var counts = {};

		for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
			var row = rows[i];
			if (!catSeen[row.catLabel]) {
				catSeen[row.catLabel] = true;
				categories.push(row.catLabel);
				catX[row.catLabel] = (row.xRaw === undefined || row.xRaw === null) ? row.catLabel : row.xRaw;
			}
			if (!seriesSeen[row.seriesLabel]) {
				seriesSeen[row.seriesLabel] = true;
				seriesOrder.push(row.seriesLabel);
				cells[row.seriesLabel] = {};
				counts[row.seriesLabel] = {};
			}
			var bucket = cells[row.seriesLabel];
			var cnt = counts[row.seriesLabel];
			if (bucket[row.catLabel] === undefined) {
				bucket[row.catLabel] = row.value;
				cnt[row.catLabel] = 1;
			} else {
				var m = dupMetric || 'sum';
				if (m === 'min') bucket[row.catLabel] = Math.min(bucket[row.catLabel], row.value);
				else if (m === 'max') bucket[row.catLabel] = Math.max(bucket[row.catLabel], row.value);
				else bucket[row.catLabel] += row.value;
				cnt[row.catLabel]++;
			}
		}
		if (dupMetric === 'avg') {
			for (var s in cells) {
				for (var c in cells[s]) { cells[s][c] = cells[s][c] / counts[s][c]; }
			}
		}

		this._sortCategories(categories, cells, seriesOrder, cfg);
		var max = parseInt(cfg.maxCategories, 10);
		if (max && categories.length > max) {
			categories = this._topCategories(categories, cells, seriesOrder, max);
		}

		var parsedColors = this._parseColors(cfg.colors);
		var out = [];
		for (var k = 0; k < seriesOrder.length; k++) {
			var sLabel = seriesOrder[k];
			var data = [];
			for (var ci = 0; ci < categories.length; ci++) {
				var cl = categories[ci];
				var v = cells[sLabel][cl];
				var point = { label: String(cl), value: v === undefined ? 0 : v };
				if (emitX) { point.x = this._xValue(catX[cl], xAxis); }
				data.push(point);
			}
			var entry = { name: String(sLabel), data: data };
			var color = this._colorFor(parsedColors, sLabel, k);
			if (color) { entry.color = color; }
			out.push(entry);
		}
		return out;
	},

	/** Normalize a raw category value into an x the component understands. */
	_xValue: function (raw, xAxis) {
		if (raw === undefined || raw === null) { return null; }
		if (xAxis === 'linear') {
			var n = parseFloat(raw);
			return isNaN(n) ? null : n;
		}
		// time: pass through a date string (the component parses ISO/date strings);
		// GlideDateTime-ish strings ("2025-01-01 00:00:00") parse fine client-side.
		return '' + raw;
	},

	_sortCategories: function (categories, cells, seriesOrder, cfg) {
		var sort = (this._str(cfg.sort) || '').toLowerCase();
		if (!sort || sort === 'none') { return; }
		var byValue = sort.indexOf('value') > -1;
		var desc = sort.indexOf('desc') > -1;
		if (byValue) {
			var total = this._totals(categories, cells, seriesOrder);
			categories.sort(function (a, b) { return total[a] - total[b]; });
		} else {
			categories.sort(function (a, b) { return a < b ? -1 : (a > b ? 1 : 0); });
		}
		if (desc) { categories.reverse(); }
	},

	_topCategories: function (categories, cells, seriesOrder, n) {
		var total = this._totals(categories, cells, seriesOrder);
		var ranked = categories.slice();
		ranked.sort(function (a, b) { return total[b] - total[a]; });
		var keep = {};
		for (var i = 0; i < n && i < ranked.length; i++) { keep[ranked[i]] = true; }
		var result = [];
		for (var j = 0; j < categories.length; j++) {
			if (keep[categories[j]]) { result.push(categories[j]); }
		}
		return result;
	},

	_totals: function (categories, cells, seriesOrder) {
		var total = {};
		for (var ci = 0; ci < categories.length; ci++) {
			var c = categories[ci];
			var t = 0;
			for (var k = 0; k < seriesOrder.length; k++) {
				var v = cells[seriesOrder[k]][c];
				if (v) { t += v; }
			}
			total[c] = t;
		}
		return total;
	},

	_parseColors: function (colors) {
		if (!colors) { return null; }
		if (typeof colors === 'string') {
			var s = colors.replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, '');
			if (!s) { return null; }
			try {
				colors = JSON.parse(s);
			} catch (e) {
				colors = s.split(',');
				for (var i = 0; i < colors.length; i++) {
					colors[i] = colors[i].replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, '');
				}
			}
		}
		if (Object.prototype.toString.call(colors) === '[object Array]') {
			return { type: 'array', value: colors };
		}
		if (typeof colors === 'object') {
			return { type: 'map', value: colors };
		}
		return null;
	},

	_colorFor: function (parsed, label, index) {
		if (!parsed) { return null; }
		if (parsed.type === 'array') {
			if (!parsed.value.length) { return null; }
			return parsed.value[index % parsed.value.length];
		}
		if (parsed.type === 'map') {
			return parsed.value[label] || null;
		}
		return null;
	},

	_metricLabel: function (metric, valueField) {
		if (metric === 'count') { return 'Count'; }
		var nice = metric.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + metric.slice(1);
		return valueField ? (nice + ' of ' + valueField) : nice;
	},

	_readField: function (obj, field) {
		if (!field) { return ''; }
		var v = obj[field];
		if (v && typeof v === 'object') {
			if (typeof v.getDisplayValue === 'function') { return v.getDisplayValue(); }
			if (v.displayValue !== undefined) { return v.displayValue; }
			if (v.value !== undefined) { return v.value; }
		}
		return (v === undefined || v === null) ? '' : v;
	},

	_str: function (v) {
		return (v === undefined || v === null) ? '' : ('' + v).replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, '');
	},

	_blank: function (v) {
		var s = (v === undefined || v === null) ? '' : ('' + v);
		return s === '' ? '(empty)' : s;
	},

	type: 'D3ChartData'
};
]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-07 19:10:46</sys_created_on><sys_id>8377289693dd831051d7b1dcebba10f7</sys_id><sys_mod_count>2</sys_mod_count><sys_name>D3ChartData</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_8377289693dd831051d7b1dcebba10f7</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-21 14:36:50</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include><sys_es_latest_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><id>8377289693dd831051d7b1dcebba10f7</id><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-07 19:10:46</sys_created_on><sys_id>3fb7a89693dd831051d7b1dcebba1050</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-07 19:10:46</sys_updated_on><table>sys_script_include</table><use_es_latest>true</use_es_latest></sys_es_latest_script></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_include_3ded3fe2936dc35051d7b1dcebba1022
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>package_private</access><active>true</active><api_name>global.D3WordData</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>D3WordData</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[/**
 * D3WordData - Script Include (global, accessible from all application scopes,
 * Client callable = false)
 * ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 * Reusable transform that turns platform data into the JSON shape expected by
 * the x-1295779-wordcloud-chart-uic component's "Data * Words" property:
 *
 *   [ { text: "<word>", value: <weight>, color?: "#hex" }, ... ]
 *
 * This is a FLAT array - unlike the line/column chart's `series` contract there
 * is NO categorical x-axis. Each entry is one word; `value` is its weight (which
 * the component maps to font size and spiral-packs).
 *
 * Three entry points:
 *   - fromAggregate(cfg) : GlideAggregate grouped by a field -> word per group.
 *   - fromText(cfg)      : tokenize a free-text field across records and count
 *                          word frequencies (the headline feature - turn ticket
 *                          descriptions into a cloud).
 *   - fromRows(rows,cfg) : reshape an array of already-fetched plain objects.
 *
 * Written in ES5 for broad scoped/global compatibility (no let/const, arrow
 * functions, or template literals).
 */
var D3WordData = Class.create();
D3WordData.prototype = {

	initialize: function () {},

	/**
	 * Aggregate a table into words.
	 * cfg: {
	 *   table, filter, field, metric (count|sum|avg|min|max),
	 *   valueField (required if metric!=count), useDisplayValue (default true),
	 *   maxWords (top-N by value), colors
	 * }
	 * text = the group label, value = the aggregate.
	 */
	fromAggregate: function (cfg) {
		cfg = cfg || {};
		var table = this._str(cfg.table);
		var field = this._str(cfg.field);
		if (!table || !field) {
			return [];
		}
		var metric = (this._str(cfg.metric) || 'count').toLowerCase();
		var valueField = this._str(cfg.valueField);
		var useDisplay = cfg.useDisplayValue !== false && cfg.useDisplayValue !== 'false';
		if (metric !== 'count' && !valueField) {
			return []; // sum/avg/min/max need a numeric field
		}

		var ga = new GlideAggregate(table);
		if (this._str(cfg.filter)) {
			ga.addEncodedQuery(cfg.filter);
		}
		ga.groupBy(field);
		if (metric === 'count') {
			ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
		} else {
			ga.addAggregate(metric.toUpperCase(), valueField);
		}
		ga.query();

		var rows = [];
		while (ga.next()) {
			var label = useDisplay ? ga.getDisplayValue(field) : ga.getValue(field);
			var value;
			if (metric === 'count') {
				value = parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT'), 10);
			} else {
				value = parseFloat(ga.getAggregate(metric.toUpperCase(), valueField));
			}
			rows.push({
				text: this._blank(label),
				value: isNaN(value) ? 0 : value
			});
		}
		return this._finalize(rows, cfg);
	},

	/**
	 * Tokenize a free-text field across records and count word frequencies.
	 * cfg: {
	 *   table, filter, textField, stopWords (array or comma string),
	 *   minLength (default 3), minCount (default 1), maxWords (top-N),
	 *   caseInsensitive (default true), colors, recordLimit (safety cap)
	 * }
	 * text = the word, value = its frequency.
	 */
	fromText: function (cfg) {
		cfg = cfg || {};
		var table = this._str(cfg.table);
		var textField = this._str(cfg.textField);
		if (!table || !textField) {
			return [];
		}
		var minLength = parseInt(cfg.minLength, 10);
		if (isNaN(minLength) || minLength < 1) { minLength = 3; }
		var minCount = parseInt(cfg.minCount, 10);
		if (isNaN(minCount) || minCount < 1) { minCount = 1; }
		var caseInsensitive = cfg.caseInsensitive !== false && cfg.caseInsensitive !== 'false';
		var recordLimit = parseInt(cfg.recordLimit, 10);
		if (isNaN(recordLimit) || recordLimit <= 0) { recordLimit = 5000; }

		var stop = this._buildStopWords(cfg.stopWords, caseInsensitive);

		var gr = new GlideRecord(table);
		if (this._str(cfg.filter)) {
			gr.addEncodedQuery(cfg.filter);
		}
		gr.setLimit(recordLimit);
		gr.query();

		var counts = {};   // key -> count
		var display = {};   // key -> first-seen display form
		while (gr.next()) {
			var raw = gr.getValue(textField);
			if (raw === null || raw === undefined) { continue; }
			var tokens = this._tokenize('' + raw);
			for (var i = 0; i < tokens.length; i++) {
				var tok = tokens[i];
				if (tok.length < minLength) { continue; }
				var key = caseInsensitive ? tok.toLowerCase() : tok;
				if (stop[key]) { continue; }
				if (counts[key] === undefined) {
					counts[key] = 0;
					display[key] = caseInsensitive ? key : tok;
				}
				counts[key]++;
			}
		}

		var rows = [];
		for (var k in counts) {
			if (counts.hasOwnProperty(k) && counts[k] >= minCount) {
				rows.push({ text: display[k], value: counts[k] });
			}
		}
		return this._finalize(rows, cfg);
	},

	/**
	 * Reshape an array of plain objects into words.
	 * cfg: { textField, valueField, metric? (sum|count|min|max|avg), maxWords, colors }
	 * Duplicate texts are combined per `metric` (default sum).
	 */
	fromRows: function (rows, cfg) {
		cfg = cfg || {};
		rows = rows || [];
		var textField = this._str(cfg.textField) || 'text';
		var valueField = this._str(cfg.valueField) || 'value';
		var metric = (this._str(cfg.metric) || 'sum').toLowerCase();

		var bucket = {};
		var counts = {};
		var order = [];
		for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
			var r = rows[i] || {};
			var text = this._blank(this._readField(r, textField));
			if (text === '(empty)') { continue; }
			var v = parseFloat(this._readField(r, valueField));
			if (isNaN(v)) { v = (metric === 'count') ? 1 : 0; }
			if (bucket[text] === undefined) {
				bucket[text] = (metric === 'count') ? 1 : v;
				counts[text] = 1;
				order.push(text);
			} else {
				if (metric === 'count') { bucket[text] += 1; }
				else if (metric === 'min') { bucket[text] = Math.min(bucket[text], v); }
				else if (metric === 'max') { bucket[text] = Math.max(bucket[text], v); }
				else { bucket[text] += v; }
				counts[text]++;
			}
		}
		if (metric === 'avg') {
			for (var t in bucket) { if (bucket.hasOwnProperty(t)) { bucket[t] = bucket[t] / counts[t]; } }
		}
		var out = [];
		for (var j = 0; j < order.length; j++) {
			out.push({ text: order[j], value: bucket[order[j]] });
		}
		return this._finalize(out, cfg);
	},

	// ----- internals -------------------------------------------------------

	/** Apply top-N cap, attach colors, and return the final word array. */
	_finalize: function (rows, cfg) {
		var max = parseInt(cfg.maxWords, 10);
		if (!isNaN(max) && max > 0 && rows.length > max) {
			rows = rows.slice().sort(function (a, b) { return b.value - a.value; }).slice(0, max);
		}
		var parsedColors = this._parseColors(cfg.colors);
		var out = [];
		for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
			var entry = { text: String(rows[i].text), value: rows[i].value };
			var color = this._colorFor(parsedColors, rows[i].text, i);
			if (color) { entry.color = color; }
			out.push(entry);
		}
		return out;
	},

	/** Split a free-text string into word tokens (ES5-safe). */
	_tokenize: function (s) {
		// strip HTML tags, then split on anything that is not a letter/number/'/-
		var cleaned = ('' + s).replace(/<[^>]*>/g, ' ');
		var parts = cleaned.split(/[^A-Za-z0-9'\-]+/);
		var out = [];
		for (var i = 0; i < parts.length; i++) {
			var p = parts[i].replace(/^[-']+|[-']+$/g, '');
			if (p) { out.push(p); }
		}
		return out;
	},

	/** Build a lookup of stop words from cfg + a sensible English default list. */
	_buildStopWords: function (extra, caseInsensitive) {
		var base = this._defaultStopWords();
		var map = {};
		var i;
		for (i = 0; i < base.length; i++) {
			map[base[i]] = true;
		}
		var list = [];
		if (extra) {
			if (Object.prototype.toString.call(extra) === '[object Array]') {
				list = extra;
			} else {
				list = ('' + extra).split(',');
			}
		}
		for (i = 0; i < list.length; i++) {
			var w = this._str(list[i]);
			if (w) { map[caseInsensitive ? w.toLowerCase() : w] = true; }
		}
		return map;
	},

	_defaultStopWords: function () {
		return ['the', 'a', 'an', 'and', 'or', 'but', 'if', 'then', 'else', 'when',
			'at', 'by', 'for', 'with', 'about', 'against', 'between', 'into',
			'through', 'during', 'before', 'after', 'above', 'below', 'to', 'from',
			'up', 'down', 'in', 'out', 'on', 'off', 'over', 'under', 'again',
			'further', 'once', 'here', 'there', 'all', 'any', 'both', 'each',
			'few', 'more', 'most', 'other', 'some', 'such', 'no', 'nor', 'not',
			'only', 'own', 'same', 'so', 'than', 'too', 'very', 'can', 'will',
			'just', 'should', 'now', 'is', 'are', 'was', 'were', 'be', 'been',
			'being', 'have', 'has', 'had', 'having', 'do', 'does', 'did', 'doing',
			'this', 'that', 'these', 'those', 'i', 'you', 'he', 'she', 'it', 'we',
			'they', 'me', 'him', 'her', 'us', 'them', 'my', 'your', 'his', 'its',
			'our', 'their', 'what', 'which', 'who', 'whom', 'as', 'of', 'because',
			'while', 'would', 'could', 'also', 'please', 'thanks', 'thank', 'hi',
			'hello', 'regards', 'dear'];
	},

	_parseColors: function (colors) {
		if (!colors) { return null; }
		if (typeof colors === 'string') {
			var s = colors.replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, '');
			if (!s) { return null; }
			try {
				colors = JSON.parse(s);
			} catch (e) {
				colors = s.split(',');
				for (var i = 0; i < colors.length; i++) {
					colors[i] = colors[i].replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, '');
				}
			}
		}
		if (Object.prototype.toString.call(colors) === '[object Array]') {
			return { type: 'array', value: colors };
		}
		if (typeof colors === 'object') {
			return { type: 'map', value: colors };
		}
		return null;
	},

	_colorFor: function (parsed, label, index) {
		if (!parsed) { return null; }
		if (parsed.type === 'array') {
			if (!parsed.value.length) { return null; }
			return parsed.value[index % parsed.value.length];
		}
		if (parsed.type === 'map') {
			return parsed.value[label] || null;
		}
		return null;
	},

	_readField: function (obj, field) {
		if (!field) { return ''; }
		var v = obj[field];
		if (v && typeof v === 'object') {
			if (typeof v.getDisplayValue === 'function') { return v.getDisplayValue(); }
			if (v.displayValue !== undefined) { return v.displayValue; }
			if (v.value !== undefined) { return v.value; }
		}
		return (v === undefined || v === null) ? '' : v;
	},

	_str: function (v) {
		return (v === undefined || v === null) ? '' : ('' + v).replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, '');
	},

	_blank: function (v) {
		var s = (v === undefined || v === null) ? '' : ('' + v);
		return s === '' ? '(empty)' : s;
	},

	type: 'D3WordData'
};
]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-21 15:40:36</sys_created_on><sys_id>3ded3fe2936dc35051d7b1dcebba1022</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>D3WordData</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_3ded3fe2936dc35051d7b1dcebba1022</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-21 15:40:36</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_ux_data_broker_transform_683df3e2936dc35051d7b1dcebba100d
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_ux_data_broker_transform"><sys_ux_data_broker_transform action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><acl_failure_result/><api_name>global.D3 Treemap Data (Hierarchy)</api_name><batch_exclude>false</batch_exclude><description/><mutates_server_data>false</mutates_server_data><name>D3 Treemap Data (Hierarchy)</name><output_schema/><private>false</private><props>[
  {
    "name": "table",
    "label": "Table",
    "description": "Table to query, e.g. 'incident'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "mandatory": true,
    "defaultValue": "incident"
  },
  {
    "name": "filter",
    "label": "Filter (encoded query)",
    "description": "Optional encoded query to scope the rows, e.g. 'active=true'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "groupField",
    "label": "Group field (level 1 / parent)",
    "description": "Field for the top-level parent nodes, e.g. 'priority'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "mandatory": true,
    "defaultValue": "priority"
  },
  {
    "name": "categoryField",
    "label": "Category field (level 2 / leaf)",
    "description": "Field for the leaf tiles within each parent, e.g. 'assignment_group'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "mandatory": true,
    "defaultValue": "assignment_group"
  },
  {
    "name": "metric",
    "label": "Metric",
    "description": "Aggregation: count | sum | avg | min | max. Default 'count'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": "count"
  },
  {
    "name": "valueField",
    "label": "Value field",
    "description": "Numeric field to aggregate (required when metric is not 'count').",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "useDisplayValue",
    "label": "Use display values for labels",
    "description": "Group/label by display value (readable) instead of raw value.",
    "fieldType": "boolean",
    "defaultValue": true
  },
  {
    "name": "rootName",
    "label": "Root node name",
    "description": "Name for the synthetic root node (not drawn). Default 'root'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": "root"
  },
  {
    "name": "colors",
    "label": "Colors (JSON)",
    "description": "Optional per-leaf colors: a JSON array applied by order, or a map keyed by leaf label / group name. Sets each leaf's 'color'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "sort",
    "label": "Tile sort",
    "description": "Order leaves within the flat pass: none | label-asc | label-desc | value-asc | value-desc.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": "value-desc"
  }
]
</props><required_translations/><schema_version>1.0.0</schema_version><script><![CDATA[function transform(input) {
	return new global.D3HierarchyData().fromHierarchy(input);
}
]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_ux_data_broker_transform</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-21 15:37:30</sys_created_on><sys_id>683df3e2936dc35051d7b1dcebba100d</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>D3 Treemap Data (Hierarchy)</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_ux_data_broker_transform_683df3e2936dc35051d7b1dcebba100d</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-21 15:37:30</sys_updated_on></sys_ux_data_broker_transform><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=683df3e2936dc35051d7b1dcebba100d"/></record_update>

global.D3 Pie/Donut DatafalsefalseD3 Pie/Donut Datafalse[ { "name": "table", "label": "Table", "description": "Table to query, e.g. 'incident'.", "fieldType": "string", "mandatory": true, "defaultValue": "incident" }, { "name": "filter", "label": "Filter (encoded query)", "description": "Optional encoded query to scope the rows, e.g. 'active=true^priority<=2'.", "fieldType": "string", "defaultValue": "" }, { "name": "categoryField", "label": "Category field (slices)", "description": "Field to group by — each distinct value becomes one slice, e.g. 'state' or 'priority'.", "fieldType": "string", "mandatory": true, "defaultValue": "state" }, { "name": "metric", "label": "Metric", "description": "Aggregation: count | sum | avg | min | max. Default 'count'.", "fieldType": "string", "defaultValue": "count" }, { "name": "valueField", "label": "Value field", "description": "Numeric field to aggregate (required when metric is not 'count'), e.g. 'business_duration'.", "fieldType": "string", "defaultValue": "" }, { "name": "useDisplayValue", "label": "Use display values for labels", "description": "Label slices by display value (readable) instead of raw value.", "fieldType": "boolean", "defaultValue": true }, { "name": "colors", "label": "Colors (JSON)", "description": "Optional per-slice colors: a JSON array [\"#2E93fA\",\"#66DA26\"] applied by order, or a map {\"Closed\":\"#66DA26\"} keyed by slice label.", "fieldType": "string", "defaultValue": "" }, { "name": "maxCategories", "label": "Max slices (top-N)", "description": "Optional limit: keep only the top-N slices by value. Blank = all.", "fieldType": "number" }, { "name": "sort", "label": "Slice sort", "description": "Order slices: none (query order), label-asc, label-desc, value-asc, value-desc.", "fieldType": "string", "defaultValue": "value-desc" }, { "name": "minSlicePercent", "label": "Group small slices below (%)", "description": "Combine slices smaller than this percent of the total into a single 'Other' slice. 0 = off.", "fieldType": "number", "defaultValue": 0 } ] 1.0.0sys_ux_data_broker_transformadmin2026-06-21 15:21:5658a9fb6a932dc35051d7b1dcebba102a1D3 Pie/Donut Dataglobalglobalsys_ux_data_broker_transform_58a9fb6a932dc35051d7b1dcebba102aadmin2026-06-21 15:22:2058a9fb6a932dc35051d7b1dcebba102aadmin2026-06-21 15:21:56dca9fb6a932dc35051d7b1dcebba102f0admin2026-06-21 15:21:56sys_ux_data_broker_transform

sys_update_xml.name: sys_ux_data_broker_transform_efa0b7a693e9c35051d7b1dcebba108d
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_ux_data_broker_transform"><sys_ux_data_broker_transform action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><acl_failure_result/><api_name>global.D3 Line Chart Data (PA)</api_name><batch_exclude>false</batch_exclude><description/><mutates_server_data>false</mutates_server_data><name>D3 Line Chart Data (PA)</name><output_schema/><private>false</private><props>[
  {
    "name": "mode",
    "label": "Mode",
    "description": "trend (per period, one line per indicator) | latest (one point per indicator) | breakdown (one point per breakdown element).",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": "trend"
  },
  {
    "name": "source",
    "label": "Source",
    "description": "auto (default) | scores | scorecard. 'scores' reads collected scores from pa_scores; 'scorecard' computes Formula/realtime indicators via the PA scorecard engine; 'auto' tries pa_scores then falls back to the scorecard engine.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": "auto"
  },
  {
    "name": "step",
    "label": "Step (scorecard period)",
    "description": "Optional period granularity when computing trends via the scorecard engine (e.g. day, week, month). Leave blank to use the indicator's default.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "indicators",
    "label": "Indicators (sys_ids or names)",
    "description": "Comma-separated indicator sys_ids or names. Used by 'trend' and 'latest' (each becomes a line / point).",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "indicator",
    "label": "Indicator (breakdown mode)",
    "description": "A single indicator sys_id or name to slice in 'breakdown' mode.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "breakdown",
    "label": "Breakdown (sys_id)",
    "description": "Breakdown sys_id (from pa_breakdowns) to slice by in 'breakdown' mode.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "lastPeriods",
    "label": "Last N periods (trend)",
    "description": "How many recent collection periods to show in 'trend' mode (ignored if From/To set).",
    "fieldType": "number",
    "defaultValue": 12
  },
  {
    "name": "from",
    "label": "From date (trend)",
    "description": "Optional start date (YYYY-MM-DD) for 'trend' mode; overrides Last N periods.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "to",
    "label": "To date (trend)",
    "description": "Optional end date (YYYY-MM-DD) for 'trend' mode.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "xAxis",
    "label": "X-axis type",
    "description": "category (default) | linear | time. For a trend, use 'time' to plot a true date axis (each point carries its collection date as 'x'). Set the component's 'Data · X-axis type' to match.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": "category"
  },
  {
    "name": "seriesName",
    "label": "Series name (latest/breakdown)",
    "description": "Name for the single line in 'latest' (default 'Latest') or 'breakdown' (default = indicator name).",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "colors",
    "label": "Colors (JSON)",
    "description": "Optional per-series colors: array [\"#2E93fA\",\"#66DA26\"] by order, or map {\"<series>\":\"#hex\"} by series name.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "maxCategories",
    "label": "Max categories (top-N)",
    "description": "Optional limit: keep only the top-N categories by total value. Blank = all.",
    "fieldType": "number"
  },
  {
    "name": "sort",
    "label": "Category sort",
    "description": "none (default — chronological for trend) | label-asc | label-desc | value-asc | value-desc.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": "none"
  },
  {
    "name": "dateField",
    "label": "Advanced: pa_scores date field",
    "description": "Override the pa_scores date column name (default 'date').",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": "date"
  },
  {
    "name": "valueField",
    "label": "Advanced: pa_scores value field",
    "description": "Override the pa_scores value column name (default 'value').",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": "value"
  },
  {
    "name": "breakdownField",
    "label": "Advanced: pa_scores breakdown field",
    "description": "Override the pa_scores breakdown column name (default 'breakdown').",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": "breakdown"
  },
  {
    "name": "elementField",
    "label": "Advanced: pa_scores element field",
    "description": "Override the pa_scores breakdown-element column name (default 'element').",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": "element"
  }
]
</props><required_translations/><schema_version>1.0.0</schema_version><script><![CDATA[function transform(input) {
	return new global.D3ChartData().fromIndicator(input);
}
]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_ux_data_broker_transform</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-21 14:42:49</sys_created_on><sys_id>efa0b7a693e9c35051d7b1dcebba108d</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>D3 Line Chart Data (PA)</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_ux_data_broker_transform_efa0b7a693e9c35051d7b1dcebba108d</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-21 14:42:49</sys_updated_on></sys_ux_data_broker_transform><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=efa0b7a693e9c35051d7b1dcebba108d"/></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_ux_data_broker_transform_b7cf6b2693e9c35051d7b1dcebba10c9
sys_update_xml.payload:
global.D3 Line Chart DatafalsefalseD3 Line Chart Datafalse[ { "name": "table", "label": "Table", "description": "Table to query, e.g. 'incident'.", "fieldType": "string", "mandatory": true, "defaultValue": "incident" }, { "name": "filter", "label": "Filter (encoded query)", "description": "Optional encoded query to scope the rows, e.g. 'active=true^priority<=2'.", "fieldType": "string", "defaultValue": "" }, { "name": "categoryField", "label": "Category field (x-axis)", "description": "Field to group by for the x-axis points, e.g. 'opened_at' for a time series or 'priority' for categories.", "fieldType": "string", "mandatory": true, "defaultValue": "priority" }, { "name": "seriesField", "label": "Series field (optional split)", "description": "Optional second field to split into multiple lines, e.g. 'state'. Blank = a single line.", "fieldType": "string", "defaultValue": "" }, { "name": "metric", "label": "Metric", "description": "Aggregation: count | sum | avg | min | max. Default 'count'.", "fieldType": "string", "defaultValue": "count" }, { "name": "valueField", "label": "Value field", "description": "Numeric field to aggregate (required when metric is not 'count'), e.g. 'business_duration'.", "fieldType": "string", "defaultValue": "" }, { "name": "seriesName", "label": "Series name (single-series)", "description": "Name for the single line when no Series field is set. Default = the metric label.", "fieldType": "string", "defaultValue": "" }, { "name": "useDisplayValue", "label": "Use display values for labels", "description": "Group/label by display value (readable) instead of raw value. For a Time x-axis, leave this OFF on date fields so the raw date drives the x value.", "fieldType": "boolean", "defaultValue": true }, { "name": "xAxis", "label": "X-axis type", "description": "category (default) | linear | time. With 'linear' or 'time', each point also carries a raw 'x' (the category field's value) so the line chart can use a true continuous/time axis. Set the component's 'Data · X-axis type' to match.", "fieldType": "string", "defaultValue": "category" }, { "name": "colors", "label": "Colors (JSON)", "description": "Optional per-series colors: a JSON array [\"#2E93fA\",\"#66DA26\"] applied by order, or a map {\"Resolved\":\"#66DA26\"} keyed by series name.", "fieldType": "string", "defaultValue": "" }, { "name": "maxCategories", "label": "Max categories (top-N)", "description": "Optional limit: keep only the top-N categories by total value. Blank = all.", "fieldType": "number" }, { "name": "sort", "label": "Category sort", "description": "Order categories: none (query order), label-asc, label-desc, value-asc, value-desc. For a time series, 'none' (with an ordered category field) or 'label-asc' keeps it chronological.", "fieldType": "string", "defaultValue": "none" } ] 1.0.0sys_ux_data_broker_transformadmin2026-06-21 14:40:16b7cf6b2693e9c35051d7b1dcebba10c90D3 Line Chart Dataglobalglobalsys_ux_data_broker_transform_b7cf6b2693e9c35051d7b1dcebba10c9admin2026-06-21 14:40:16b7cf6b2693e9c35051d7b1dcebba10c9admin2026-06-21 14:40:164a107be293e9c35051d7b1dcebba10d90admin2026-06-21 14:40:16sys_ux_data_broker_transform

sys_update_xml.name: sys_ux_data_broker_transform_7bbb3fee932dc35051d7b1dcebba1015
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_ux_data_broker_transform"><sys_ux_data_broker_transform action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><acl_failure_result/><api_name>global.D3 Scatter Data</api_name><batch_exclude>false</batch_exclude><description/><mutates_server_data>false</mutates_server_data><name>D3 Scatter Data</name><output_schema/><private>false</private><props>[
  {
    "name": "rows",
    "label": "Rows (bind to a record list)",
    "description": "Array of plain row objects to reshape into scatter points. Typically bound to the output of a 'Look up records' data resource, e.g. @data.look_up_records.results. Each row supplies x, y and optional r/label/series via the field names below.",
    "fieldType": "json"
  },
  {
    "name": "xField",
    "label": "X field",
    "description": "Row field providing the numeric x value (the horizontal axis). For a Time x-axis, point this at a date field and turn on 'X is a date'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "mandatory": true,
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "yField",
    "label": "Y field",
    "description": "Row field providing the numeric y value (the vertical axis).",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "mandatory": true,
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "rField",
    "label": "R field (bubble size, optional)",
    "description": "Row field providing the bubble radius value (the 3rd dimension). Leave blank for a plain scatter (no bubble sizing). Turn on the component's 'Points · Bubble sizing' to use it.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "seriesField",
    "label": "Series field (optional split)",
    "description": "Row field used to split rows into multiple colored series, e.g. 'assignment_group'. Blank = a single series.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "labelField",
    "label": "Label field (point identity, optional)",
    "description": "Row field used as each point's label (shown in the tooltip and returned in POINT_CLICKED). Defaults to the X field if blank.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "seriesName",
    "label": "Series name (single-series)",
    "description": "Name for the single series when no Series field is set. Default 'Series 1'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "xIsDate",
    "label": "X is a date",
    "description": "When on, the X field value is passed through as a date string (for a Time x-axis). Set the component's 'Data · X-axis type' to Time to match.",
    "fieldType": "boolean",
    "defaultValue": false
  },
  {
    "name": "colors",
    "label": "Colors (JSON)",
    "description": "Optional per-series colors: a JSON array [\"#2E93fA\",\"#66DA26\"] applied by order, or a map {\"Team A\":\"#2E93fA\"} keyed by series name.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  }
]
</props><required_translations/><schema_version>1.0.0</schema_version><script><![CDATA[function transform(input) {
	return new global.D3ScatterData().fromRows(input.rows, input);
}
]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_ux_data_broker_transform</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-21 15:31:11</sys_created_on><sys_id>7bbb3fee932dc35051d7b1dcebba1015</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>D3 Scatter Data</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_ux_data_broker_transform_7bbb3fee932dc35051d7b1dcebba1015</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-21 15:31:11</sys_updated_on></sys_ux_data_broker_transform><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=7bbb3fee932dc35051d7b1dcebba1015"/></record_update>
