sys_update_xml.name: sys_ux_data_broker_transform_4088fba6932dc35051d7b1dcebba109c
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_ux_data_broker_transform"><sys_ux_data_broker_transform action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><acl_failure_result/><api_name>global.D3 Heatmap Data</api_name><batch_exclude>false</batch_exclude><description/><mutates_server_data>false</mutates_server_data><name>D3 Heatmap Data</name><output_schema/><private>false</private><props>[
  {
    "name": "table",
    "label": "Table",
    "description": "Table to query, e.g. 'incident'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "mandatory": true,
    "defaultValue": "incident"
  },
  {
    "name": "filter",
    "label": "Filter (encoded query)",
    "description": "Optional encoded query to scope the rows, e.g. 'active=true^priority<=2'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "xField",
    "label": "X field (columns)",
    "description": "Field to group by for the columns (X category), e.g. 'priority'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "mandatory": true,
    "defaultValue": "priority"
  },
  {
    "name": "yField",
    "label": "Y field (rows)",
    "description": "Field to group by for the rows (Y category), e.g. 'state'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "mandatory": true,
    "defaultValue": "state"
  },
  {
    "name": "metric",
    "label": "Metric",
    "description": "Aggregation per (x,y) cell: count | sum | avg | min | max. Default 'count'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": "count"
  },
  {
    "name": "valueField",
    "label": "Value field",
    "description": "Numeric field to aggregate (required when metric is not 'count'), e.g. 'reassignment_count'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "useDisplayValue",
    "label": "Use display values for labels",
    "description": "Group/label the x and y categories by display value (readable) instead of raw value.",
    "fieldType": "boolean",
    "defaultValue": true
  }
]
</props><required_translations/><schema_version>1.0.0</schema_version><script><![CDATA[function transform(input) {
	return new global.D3MatrixData().fromAggregate(input);
}
]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_ux_data_broker_transform</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-21 15:16:59</sys_created_on><sys_id>4088fba6932dc35051d7b1dcebba109c</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>D3 Heatmap Data</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_ux_data_broker_transform_4088fba6932dc35051d7b1dcebba109c</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-21 15:16:59</sys_updated_on></sys_ux_data_broker_transform><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=4088fba6932dc35051d7b1dcebba109c"/></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_ux_data_broker_transform_01eabbea932dc35051d7b1dcebba1093
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_ux_data_broker_transform"><sys_ux_data_broker_transform action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><acl_failure_result/><api_name>global.D3 Sankey Data</api_name><batch_exclude>false</batch_exclude><description/><mutates_server_data>false</mutates_server_data><name>D3 Sankey Data</name><output_schema/><private>false</private><props>[
  {
    "name": "table",
    "label": "Table",
    "description": "Table to query, e.g. 'incident'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "mandatory": true,
    "defaultValue": "incident"
  },
  {
    "name": "filter",
    "label": "Filter (encoded query)",
    "description": "Optional encoded query to scope the rows, e.g. 'active=true^priority<=2'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "sourceField",
    "label": "Source field",
    "description": "Field whose value becomes the SOURCE node of each flow, e.g. 'contact_type' or 'state'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "mandatory": true,
    "defaultValue": "contact_type"
  },
  {
    "name": "targetField",
    "label": "Target field",
    "description": "Field whose value becomes the TARGET node of each flow, e.g. 'state' or 'assignment_group'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "mandatory": true,
    "defaultValue": "state"
  },
  {
    "name": "metric",
    "label": "Metric",
    "description": "Aggregation for the link value: count | sum | avg | min | max. Default 'count'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": "count"
  },
  {
    "name": "valueField",
    "label": "Value field",
    "description": "Numeric field to aggregate (required when metric is not 'count'), e.g. 'business_duration'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "useDisplayValue",
    "label": "Use display values for labels",
    "description": "Group/label nodes by display value (readable) instead of raw value.",
    "fieldType": "boolean",
    "defaultValue": true
  },
  {
    "name": "colors",
    "label": "Colors (JSON)",
    "description": "Optional per-node colors: a JSON array [\"#2E93fA\",\"#66DA26\"] applied by node order, or a map {\"Resolved\":\"#66DA26\"} keyed by node name.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "prefixStages",
    "label": "Prefix stages (split shared nodes)",
    "description": "When ON, a value appearing as both a source and a target is split into two nodes ('From: X' and 'To: X'), preventing a self-referential collapse. When OFF (default), matching source/target values share one node (natural multi-stage flow).",
    "fieldType": "boolean",
    "defaultValue": false
  }
]
</props><required_translations/><schema_version>1.0.0</schema_version><script><![CDATA[function transform(input) {
	return new global.D3SankeyData().fromAggregate(input);
}
]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_ux_data_broker_transform</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-21 15:27:27</sys_created_on><sys_id>01eabbea932dc35051d7b1dcebba1093</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>D3 Sankey Data</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_ux_data_broker_transform_01eabbea932dc35051d7b1dcebba1093</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-21 15:27:27</sys_updated_on></sys_ux_data_broker_transform><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=01eabbea932dc35051d7b1dcebba1093"/></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_include_7b593ba693e9c35051d7b1dcebba107a
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>package_private</access><active>true</active><api_name>global.D3SliceData</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>D3SliceData</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[/**
 * D3SliceData — Script Include (global, accessible from all application scopes)
 * ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 * Reusable transform that turns platform data into the JSON shapes expected by
 * the x-1295779-pie-chart-uic component's "Data · Chart data" property.
 *
 * This chart's data contract is DIFFERENT from the line/column chart family
 * (which use a `series` array of { name, color, data:[{label,value}] }). A
 * pie/donut/sunburst consumes one of two shapes:
 *
 *   1) FLAT slices  (pie/donut, single-ring sunburst):
 *        [ { label, value, color? }, ... ]
 *
 *   2) HIERARCHY tree (multi-ring sunburst):
 *        { name, children: [ { name, value } | { name, children:[...] } ] }
 *
 * Entry points:
 *   - fromAggregate(cfg)  : flat slices via GlideAggregate grouped by one field.
 *   - fromHierarchy(cfg)  : a nested tree from a TWO-level grouping (groupField
 *                           then categoryField) — good for sunburst.
 *   - fromRows(rows, cfg) : reshape an array of already-fetched plain objects
 *                           into flat slices.
 *
 * Written in ES5 for broad scoped/global compatibility (no arrow funcs / let /
 * const / template literals).
 */
var D3SliceData = Class.create();
D3SliceData.prototype = {

	initialize: function () {},

	/**
	 * Aggregate a table into a FLAT slice array.
	 * cfg: {
	 *   table, filter, categoryField, metric (count|sum|avg|min|max),
	 *   valueField (required if metric!=count), useDisplayValue (default true),
	 *   colors, maxCategories?, sort?, minSlicePercent?
	 * }
	 * Returns: [ { label, value, color? }, ... ]
	 */
	fromAggregate: function (cfg) {
		cfg = cfg || {};
		var table = this._str(cfg.table);
		var categoryField = this._str(cfg.categoryField);
		if (!table || !categoryField) {
			return [];
		}
		var metric = (this._str(cfg.metric) || 'count').toLowerCase();
		var valueField = this._str(cfg.valueField);
		var useDisplay = cfg.useDisplayValue !== false && cfg.useDisplayValue !== 'false';
		if (metric !== 'count' && !valueField) {
			return []; // sum/avg/min/max need a numeric field
		}

		var ga = new GlideAggregate(table);
		if (this._str(cfg.filter)) {
			ga.addEncodedQuery(cfg.filter);
		}
		ga.groupBy(categoryField);
		if (metric === 'count') {
			ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
		} else {
			ga.addAggregate(metric.toUpperCase(), valueField);
		}
		ga.orderBy(categoryField);
		ga.query();

		var rows = [];
		while (ga.next()) {
			var catLabel = useDisplay ? ga.getDisplayValue(categoryField) : ga.getValue(categoryField);
			var value;
			if (metric === 'count') {
				value = parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT'), 10);
			} else {
				value = parseFloat(ga.getAggregate(metric.toUpperCase(), valueField));
			}
			rows.push({
				label: this._blank(catLabel),
				value: isNaN(value) ? 0 : value
			});
		}
		return this._buildSlices(rows, cfg, null);
	},

	/**
	 * Build a HIERARCHY tree from a TWO-level grouping of a table (ring 1 =
	 * groupField, ring 2 = categoryField), aggregated by a metric. Leaf nodes
	 * carry `value`; internal nodes are summed by the component.
	 * cfg: {
	 *   table, filter, groupField (ring 1), categoryField (ring 2),
	 *   metric, valueField, useDisplayValue (default true),
	 *   rootName?, colors? (applied to ring-1 groups), sort?
	 * }
	 * Returns: { name, children: [ { name, color?, children: [ { name, value } ] } ] }
	 */
	fromHierarchy: function (cfg) {
		cfg = cfg || {};
		var table = this._str(cfg.table);
		var groupField = this._str(cfg.groupField);
		var categoryField = this._str(cfg.categoryField);
		if (!table || !groupField || !categoryField) {
			return { name: this._str(cfg.rootName) || 'root', children: [] };
		}
		var metric = (this._str(cfg.metric) || 'count').toLowerCase();
		var valueField = this._str(cfg.valueField);
		var useDisplay = cfg.useDisplayValue !== false && cfg.useDisplayValue !== 'false';
		if (metric !== 'count' && !valueField) {
			return { name: this._str(cfg.rootName) || 'root', children: [] };
		}

		var ga = new GlideAggregate(table);
		if (this._str(cfg.filter)) {
			ga.addEncodedQuery(cfg.filter);
		}
		ga.groupBy(groupField);
		ga.groupBy(categoryField);
		if (metric === 'count') {
			ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
		} else {
			ga.addAggregate(metric.toUpperCase(), valueField);
		}
		ga.orderBy(groupField);
		ga.orderBy(categoryField);
		ga.query();

		var groupOrder = [];
		var groupSeen = {};
		var groupChildren = {};
		while (ga.next()) {
			var gLabel = this._blank(useDisplay ? ga.getDisplayValue(groupField) : ga.getValue(groupField));
			var cLabel = this._blank(useDisplay ? ga.getDisplayValue(categoryField) : ga.getValue(categoryField));
			var v;
			if (metric === 'count') {
				v = parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT'), 10);
			} else {
				v = parseFloat(ga.getAggregate(metric.toUpperCase(), valueField));
			}
			if (isNaN(v)) { v = 0; }
			if (!groupSeen[gLabel]) {
				groupSeen[gLabel] = true;
				groupOrder.push(gLabel);
				groupChildren[gLabel] = [];
			}
			groupChildren[gLabel].push({ name: String(cLabel), value: v });
		}

		var parsedColors = this._parseColors(cfg.colors);
		var children = [];
		for (var i = 0; i < groupOrder.length; i++) {
			var name = groupOrder[i];
			var node = { name: String(name), children: groupChildren[name] };
			var col = this._colorFor(parsedColors, name, i);
			if (col) { node.color = col; }
			children.push(node);
		}
		return { name: this._str(cfg.rootName) || 'All', children: children };
	},

	/**
	 * Reshape an array of plain objects into a FLAT slice array.
	 * cfg: { categoryField, valueField, metric? (combine dups; default sum),
	 *        colors?, maxCategories?, sort?, minSlicePercent? }
	 * Returns: [ { label, value, color? }, ... ]
	 */
	fromRows: function (rows, cfg) {
		cfg = cfg || {};
		rows = rows || [];
		var categoryField = this._str(cfg.categoryField);
		var valueField = this._str(cfg.valueField);

		var collected = [];
		for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
			var r = rows[i] || {};
			var catLabel = this._readField(r, categoryField);
			var value = parseFloat(this._readField(r, valueField));
			collected.push({
				label: this._blank(catLabel),
				value: isNaN(value) ? 0 : value
			});
		}
		return this._buildSlices(collected, cfg, (this._str(cfg.metric) || 'sum').toLowerCase());
	},

	// ----- internals -------------------------------------------------------

	/**
	 * Build the ordered flat slice array from rows {label, value}.
	 * dupMetric: how to combine duplicate labels (null = assume unique).
	 * Applies sort, top-N (maxCategories), per-slice colors, and small-slice
	 * grouping (minSlicePercent -> "Other").
	 */
	_buildSlices: function (rows, cfg, dupMetric) {
		var order = [];
		var seen = {};
		var totals = {};
		var counts = {};

		for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
			var row = rows[i];
			var label = row.label;
			if (!seen[label]) {
				seen[label] = true;
				order.push(label);
				totals[label] = row.value;
				counts[label] = 1;
			} else {
				var m = dupMetric || 'sum';
				if (m === 'min') { totals[label] = Math.min(totals[label], row.value); }
				else if (m === 'max') { totals[label] = Math.max(totals[label], row.value); }
				else { totals[label] += row.value; }
				counts[label]++;
			}
		}
		if (dupMetric === 'avg') {
			for (var a in totals) { totals[a] = totals[a] / counts[a]; }
		}

		this._sortCategories(order, totals, cfg);

		var max = parseInt(cfg.maxCategories, 10);
		if (max && order.length > max) {
			order = this._topCategories(order, totals, max);
		}

		// small-slice grouping into "Other"
		var minPct = parseFloat(cfg.minSlicePercent);
		var grandTotal = 0;
		for (var t = 0; t < order.length; t++) { grandTotal += totals[order[t]]; }
		if (grandTotal <= 0) { grandTotal = 1; }

		var parsedColors = this._parseColors(cfg.colors);
		var out = [];
		var other = 0;
		var colorIdx = 0;
		for (var k = 0; k < order.length; k++) {
			var lbl = order[k];
			var val = totals[lbl];
			if (!isNaN(minPct) && minPct > 0 && (val / grandTotal) * 100 < minPct) {
				other += val;
				continue;
			}
			var slice = { label: String(lbl), value: val };
			var color = this._colorFor(parsedColors, lbl, colorIdx);
			if (color) { slice.color = color; }
			out.push(slice);
			colorIdx++;
		}
		if (other > 0) {
			out.push({ label: 'Other', value: other });
		}
		return out;
	},

	_sortCategories: function (categories, totals, cfg) {
		var sort = (this._str(cfg.sort) || '').toLowerCase();
		if (!sort || sort === 'none') { return; }
		var byValue = sort.indexOf('value') > -1;
		var desc = sort.indexOf('desc') > -1;
		if (byValue) {
			categories.sort(function (a, b) { return totals[a] - totals[b]; });
		} else {
			categories.sort(function (a, b) { return a < b ? -1 : (a > b ? 1 : 0); });
		}
		if (desc) { categories.reverse(); }
	},

	_topCategories: function (categories, totals, n) {
		var ranked = categories.slice();
		ranked.sort(function (a, b) { return totals[b] - totals[a]; });
		var keep = {};
		for (var i = 0; i < n && i < ranked.length; i++) { keep[ranked[i]] = true; }
		var result = [];
		for (var j = 0; j < categories.length; j++) {
			if (keep[categories[j]]) { result.push(categories[j]); }
		}
		return result;
	},

	_parseColors: function (colors) {
		if (!colors) { return null; }
		if (typeof colors === 'string') {
			var s = colors.replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, '');
			if (!s) { return null; }
			try {
				colors = JSON.parse(s);
			} catch (e) {
				colors = s.split(',');
				for (var i = 0; i < colors.length; i++) {
					colors[i] = colors[i].replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, '');
				}
			}
		}
		if (Object.prototype.toString.call(colors) === '[object Array]') {
			return { type: 'array', value: colors };
		}
		if (typeof colors === 'object') {
			return { type: 'map', value: colors };
		}
		return null;
	},

	_colorFor: function (parsed, label, index) {
		if (!parsed) { return null; }
		if (parsed.type === 'array') {
			if (!parsed.value.length) { return null; }
			return parsed.value[index % parsed.value.length];
		}
		if (parsed.type === 'map') {
			return parsed.value[label] || null;
		}
		return null;
	},

	_readField: function (obj, field) {
		if (!field) { return ''; }
		var v = obj[field];
		if (v && typeof v === 'object') {
			if (typeof v.getDisplayValue === 'function') { return v.getDisplayValue(); }
			if (v.displayValue !== undefined) { return v.displayValue; }
			if (v.value !== undefined) { return v.value; }
		}
		return (v === undefined || v === null) ? '' : v;
	},

	_str: function (v) {
		return (v === undefined || v === null) ? '' : ('' + v).replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, '');
	},

	_blank: function (v) {
		var s = (v === undefined || v === null) ? '' : ('' + v);
		return s === '' ? '(empty)' : s;
	},

	type: 'D3SliceData'
};
]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-21 15:20:48</sys_created_on><sys_id>7b593ba693e9c35051d7b1dcebba107a</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>D3SliceData</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_7b593ba693e9c35051d7b1dcebba107a</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-21 15:20:48</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_include_d3dc33a2936dc35051d7b1dcebba101a
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>package_private</access><active>true</active><api_name>global.D3HierarchyData</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>D3HierarchyData</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[/**
 * D3HierarchyData — Script Include (global, accessible from all application scopes,
 * Client callable = false)
 * ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 * Reusable transform that turns platform data into the JSON shape expected by
 * the x-1295779-treemap-chart-uic component's "Data · Treemap data" property.
 *
 * The treemap accepts TWO shapes (auto-detected by the component):
 *
 *   FLAT (array):
 *     [ { label: "Laptops", value: 40, group: "Hardware" }, ... ]
 *     A `group` field (optional) makes the component build a 2-level tree.
 *
 *   HIERARCHY (object):
 *     { name: "root", children: [ { name: "Hardware",
 *         children: [ { name: "Laptops", value: 40 } ] } ] }
 *     Leaves carry `value`; internal nodes sum their descendants.
 *
 * Three entry points:
 *   - fromAggregate(cfg)  : FLAT [{label,value,group?}] via GlideAggregate
 *                           grouped by categoryField (+ optional groupField).
 *   - fromHierarchy(cfg)  : HIERARCHY {name,children:[...]} from a TWO-level
 *                           grouping groupField -> categoryField.
 *   - fromRows(rows, cfg) : reshape an array of plain objects to FLAT
 *                           [{label,value,group?}].
 *
 * Helper patterns (_str, _blank, _parseColors, _colorFor, _sortCategories,
 * _topCategories, _readField) mirror the D3ChartData Script Include used by the
 * line/column charts so the family stays consistent.
 *
 * Written in ES5 for broad scoped/global compatibility.
 */
var D3HierarchyData = Class.create();
D3HierarchyData.prototype = {

	initialize: function () {},

	/**
	 * Aggregate a table into a FLAT array of tiles.
	 * cfg: {
	 *   table, filter, categoryField, groupField?, metric (count|sum|avg|min|max),
	 *   valueField (required if metric!=count), useDisplayValue (default true),
	 *   colors, maxCategories?, sort?
	 * }
	 * Returns: [ { label, value, group?, color? }, ... ]
	 */
	fromAggregate: function (cfg) {
		cfg = cfg || {};
		var table = this._str(cfg.table);
		var categoryField = this._str(cfg.categoryField);
		if (!table || !categoryField) {
			return [];
		}
		var groupField = this._str(cfg.groupField);
		var metric = (this._str(cfg.metric) || 'count').toLowerCase();
		var valueField = this._str(cfg.valueField);
		var useDisplay = cfg.useDisplayValue !== false && cfg.useDisplayValue !== 'false';
		if (metric !== 'count' && !valueField) {
			return []; // sum/avg/min/max need a numeric field
		}

		var ga = new GlideAggregate(table);
		if (this._str(cfg.filter)) {
			ga.addEncodedQuery(cfg.filter);
		}
		if (groupField) {
			ga.groupBy(groupField);
		}
		ga.groupBy(categoryField);
		if (metric === 'count') {
			ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
		} else {
			ga.addAggregate(metric.toUpperCase(), valueField);
		}
		ga.orderBy(categoryField);
		ga.query();

		var rows = [];
		while (ga.next()) {
			var catLabel = useDisplay ? ga.getDisplayValue(categoryField) : ga.getValue(categoryField);
			var groupLabel = '';
			if (groupField) {
				groupLabel = useDisplay ? ga.getDisplayValue(groupField) : ga.getValue(groupField);
			}
			var value;
			if (metric === 'count') {
				value = parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT'), 10);
			} else {
				value = parseFloat(ga.getAggregate(metric.toUpperCase(), valueField));
			}
			rows.push({
				label: this._blank(catLabel),
				group: groupField ? this._blank(groupLabel) : null,
				value: isNaN(value) ? 0 : value
			});
		}
		return this._buildFlat(rows, cfg);
	},

	/**
	 * Build a nested HIERARCHY object from a TWO-level grouping.
	 * cfg: {
	 *   table, filter, groupField (level 1), categoryField (level 2/leaf),
	 *   metric, valueField, useDisplayValue, rootName?, colors, sort?
	 * }
	 * Returns: { name, children: [ { name, children: [ { name, value, color? } ] } ] }
	 */
	fromHierarchy: function (cfg) {
		cfg = cfg || {};
		var table = this._str(cfg.table);
		var groupField = this._str(cfg.groupField);
		var categoryField = this._str(cfg.categoryField);
		var rootName = this._str(cfg.rootName) || 'root';
		if (!table || !groupField || !categoryField) {
			return { name: rootName, children: [] };
		}
		// reuse the flat aggregator (grouped), then nest it.
		var flatCfg = {
			table: table,
			filter: cfg.filter,
			categoryField: categoryField,
			groupField: groupField,
			metric: cfg.metric,
			valueField: cfg.valueField,
			useDisplayValue: cfg.useDisplayValue,
			colors: cfg.colors,
			sort: cfg.sort
		};
		var flat = this.fromAggregate(flatCfg);
		return this._nest(flat, rootName, cfg);
	},

	/**
	 * Reshape an array of plain objects into a FLAT array of tiles.
	 * cfg: { categoryField, groupField?, valueField, metric?, colors, sort?, maxCategories? }
	 * Returns: [ { label, value, group?, color? }, ... ]
	 */
	fromRows: function (rows, cfg) {
		cfg = cfg || {};
		rows = rows || [];
		var categoryField = this._str(cfg.categoryField);
		var groupField = this._str(cfg.groupField);
		var valueField = this._str(cfg.valueField);

		var collected = [];
		for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
			var r = rows[i] || {};
			var catLabel = this._readField(r, categoryField);
			var groupLabel = groupField ? this._readField(r, groupField) : null;
			var value = parseFloat(this._readField(r, valueField));
			collected.push({
				label: this._blank(catLabel),
				group: groupField ? this._blank(groupLabel) : null,
				value: isNaN(value) ? 0 : value
			});
		}
		return this._buildFlat(collected, cfg, (this._str(cfg.metric) || 'sum').toLowerCase());
	},

	// ----- internals -------------------------------------------------------

	/**
	 * Combine duplicate (group,label) rows, sort, top-N, and attach colors.
	 * Returns the flat tile array.
	 */
	_buildFlat: function (rows, cfg, dupMetric) {
		var order = [];
		var seen = {};
		var cells = {};
		var counts = {};
		var groups = {};
		var i;

		for (i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
			var row = rows[i];
			var key = (row.group === null ? '' : row.group) + ' ' + row.label;
			if (!seen[key]) {
				seen[key] = true;
				order.push(key);
				cells[key] = row.value;
				counts[key] = 1;
				groups[key] = row.group;
			} else {
				var m = dupMetric || 'sum';
				if (m === 'min') { cells[key] = Math.min(cells[key], row.value); }
				else if (m === 'max') { cells[key] = Math.max(cells[key], row.value); }
				else { cells[key] += row.value; }
				counts[key]++;
			}
		}
		if (dupMetric === 'avg') {
			for (var k in cells) {
				if (cells.hasOwnProperty(k)) { cells[k] = cells[k] / counts[k]; }
			}
		}

		// materialize tiles preserving discovery order
		var tiles = [];
		for (i = 0; i < order.length; i++) {
			var ok = order[i];
			var parts = ok.split(' ');
			var grp = groups[ok];
			var tile = { label: parts[1], value: cells[ok] };
			if (grp !== null && grp !== undefined && grp !== '') { tile.group = grp; }
			tiles.push(tile);
		}

		// sort by value if requested
		this._sortTiles(tiles, cfg);

		// top-N by value
		var max = parseInt(cfg.maxCategories, 10);
		if (max && tiles.length > max) {
			var ranked = tiles.slice();
			ranked.sort(function (a, b) { return b.value - a.value; });
			var keep = {};
			for (var r2 = 0; r2 < max && r2 < ranked.length; r2++) {
				keep[this._tileKey(ranked[r2])] = true;
			}
			var kept = [];
			for (var t = 0; t < tiles.length; t++) {
				if (keep[this._tileKey(tiles[t])]) { kept.push(tiles[t]); }
			}
			tiles = kept;
		}

		// attach colors (array by order, or map keyed by label/group)
		var parsedColors = this._parseColors(cfg.colors);
		if (parsedColors) {
			for (var c = 0; c < tiles.length; c++) {
				var col = this._colorFor(parsedColors, tiles[c].label, c);
				if (!col && tiles[c].group) { col = this._colorFor(parsedColors, tiles[c].group, c); }
				if (col) { tiles[c].color = col; }
			}
		}
		return tiles;
	},

	/** Nest a flat tile array into a 2-level hierarchy object. */
	_nest: function (flat, rootName, cfg) {
		var order = [];
		var byGroup = {};
		var i;
		for (i = 0; i < flat.length; i++) {
			var t = flat[i];
			var g = (t.group === undefined || t.group === null || t.group === '') ? '(ungrouped)' : t.group;
			if (!byGroup[g]) { byGroup[g] = []; order.push(g); }
			var leaf = { name: t.label, value: t.value };
			if (t.color) { leaf.color = t.color; }
			byGroup[g].push(leaf);
		}
		var children = [];
		for (i = 0; i < order.length; i++) {
			children.push({ name: order[i], children: byGroup[order[i]] });
		}
		return { name: rootName, children: children };
	},

	_tileKey: function (t) {
		return (t.group === undefined || t.group === null ? '' : t.group) + ' ' + t.label;
	},

	_sortTiles: function (tiles, cfg) {
		var sort = (this._str(cfg.sort) || '').toLowerCase();
		if (!sort || sort === 'none') { return; }
		var byValue = sort.indexOf('value') > -1;
		var desc = sort.indexOf('desc') > -1;
		if (byValue) {
			tiles.sort(function (a, b) { return a.value - b.value; });
		} else {
			tiles.sort(function (a, b) { return a.label < b.label ? -1 : (a.label > b.label ? 1 : 0); });
		}
		if (desc) { tiles.reverse(); }
	},

	// kept for parity with D3ChartData helper surface
	_sortCategories: function (categories, cells, seriesOrder, cfg) {
		var sort = (this._str(cfg.sort) || '').toLowerCase();
		if (!sort || sort === 'none') { return; }
		var byValue = sort.indexOf('value') > -1;
		var desc = sort.indexOf('desc') > -1;
		if (byValue) {
			var total = this._totals(categories, cells, seriesOrder);
			categories.sort(function (a, b) { return total[a] - total[b]; });
		} else {
			categories.sort(function (a, b) { return a < b ? -1 : (a > b ? 1 : 0); });
		}
		if (desc) { categories.reverse(); }
	},

	_topCategories: function (categories, cells, seriesOrder, n) {
		var total = this._totals(categories, cells, seriesOrder);
		var ranked = categories.slice();
		ranked.sort(function (a, b) { return total[b] - total[a]; });
		var keep = {};
		for (var i = 0; i < n && i < ranked.length; i++) { keep[ranked[i]] = true; }
		var result = [];
		for (var j = 0; j < categories.length; j++) {
			if (keep[categories[j]]) { result.push(categories[j]); }
		}
		return result;
	},

	_totals: function (categories, cells, seriesOrder) {
		var total = {};
		for (var ci = 0; ci < categories.length; ci++) {
			var c = categories[ci];
			var t = 0;
			for (var k = 0; k < seriesOrder.length; k++) {
				var v = cells[seriesOrder[k]] ? cells[seriesOrder[k]][c] : 0;
				if (v) { t += v; }
			}
			total[c] = t;
		}
		return total;
	},

	_parseColors: function (colors) {
		if (!colors) { return null; }
		if (typeof colors === 'string') {
			var s = colors.replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, '');
			if (!s) { return null; }
			try {
				colors = JSON.parse(s);
			} catch (e) {
				colors = s.split(',');
				for (var i = 0; i < colors.length; i++) {
					colors[i] = colors[i].replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, '');
				}
			}
		}
		if (Object.prototype.toString.call(colors) === '[object Array]') {
			return { type: 'array', value: colors };
		}
		if (typeof colors === 'object') {
			return { type: 'map', value: colors };
		}
		return null;
	},

	_colorFor: function (parsed, label, index) {
		if (!parsed) { return null; }
		if (parsed.type === 'array') {
			if (!parsed.value.length) { return null; }
			return parsed.value[index % parsed.value.length];
		}
		if (parsed.type === 'map') {
			return parsed.value[label] || null;
		}
		return null;
	},

	_readField: function (obj, field) {
		if (!field) { return ''; }
		var v = obj[field];
		if (v && typeof v === 'object') {
			if (typeof v.getDisplayValue === 'function') { return v.getDisplayValue(); }
			if (v.displayValue !== undefined) { return v.displayValue; }
			if (v.value !== undefined) { return v.value; }
		}
		return (v === undefined || v === null) ? '' : v;
	},

	_str: function (v) {
		return (v === undefined || v === null) ? '' : ('' + v).replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, '');
	},

	_blank: function (v) {
		var s = (v === undefined || v === null) ? '' : ('' + v);
		return s === '' ? '(empty)' : s;
	},

	type: 'D3HierarchyData'
};
]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-21 15:36:03</sys_created_on><sys_id>d3dc33a2936dc35051d7b1dcebba101a</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>D3HierarchyData</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_d3dc33a2936dc35051d7b1dcebba101a</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-21 15:36:03</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_include_8dcafb2e932dc35051d7b1dcebba1076
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>package_private</access><active>true</active><api_name>global.D3SankeyData</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>D3SankeyData</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[/**
 * D3SankeyData — Script Include (global, accessible from all application scopes)
 * ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 * Reusable transform that turns platform data into the GRAPH shape expected by
 * the x-1295779-sankey-chart-uic component's "Data · Graph data" property:
 *
 *   {
 *     nodes: [ { name: "<stage>", color?: "#hex" }, ... ],
 *     links: [ { source: "<name>", target: "<name>", value: <number> }, ... ]
 *   }
 *
 * This DIFFERS from the line/column chart's D3ChartData, which produces a
 * `series` array (categorical x + value y). A Sankey models FLOWS BETWEEN nodes,
 * so the output is a node set + a link set built by grouping on TWO fields (a
 * source field and a target field) rather than one category field.
 *
 * Two entry points:
 *   - fromAggregate(cfg)  : server-side GlideAggregate grouped by sourceField AND
 *                           targetField (count/sum/avg/min/max).
 *   - fromRows(rows, cfg) : reshape an array of already-fetched plain objects.
 *
 * Written in ES5 for broad scoped/global compatibility (no let/const, arrow
 * functions, or template literals).
 */
var D3SankeyData = Class.create();
D3SankeyData.prototype = {

	initialize: function () {},

	/**
	 * Aggregate a table into a Sankey graph.
	 * cfg: {
	 *   table, filter,
	 *   sourceField,            // field whose value is the link's SOURCE node
	 *   targetField,            // field whose value is the link's TARGET node
	 *   metric (count|sum|avg|min|max),
	 *   valueField (required if metric!=count),
	 *   useDisplayValue (default true),
	 *   colors,                 // optional node colors: array (by order) or { name: color } map
	 *   prefixStages (default false)   // see _build()
	 * }
	 */
	fromAggregate: function (cfg) {
		cfg = cfg || {};
		var table = this._str(cfg.table);
		var sourceField = this._str(cfg.sourceField);
		var targetField = this._str(cfg.targetField);
		if (!table || !sourceField || !targetField) {
			return { nodes: [], links: [] };
		}
		var metric = (this._str(cfg.metric) || 'count').toLowerCase();
		var valueField = this._str(cfg.valueField);
		var useDisplay = cfg.useDisplayValue !== false && cfg.useDisplayValue !== 'false';
		if (metric !== 'count' && !valueField) {
			return { nodes: [], links: [] }; // sum/avg/min/max need a numeric field
		}

		var ga = new GlideAggregate(table);
		if (this._str(cfg.filter)) {
			ga.addEncodedQuery(cfg.filter);
		}
		ga.groupBy(sourceField);
		ga.groupBy(targetField);
		if (metric === 'count') {
			ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
		} else {
			ga.addAggregate(metric.toUpperCase(), valueField);
		}
		ga.query();

		var rows = [];
		while (ga.next()) {
			var sVal = useDisplay ? ga.getDisplayValue(sourceField) : ga.getValue(sourceField);
			var tVal = useDisplay ? ga.getDisplayValue(targetField) : ga.getValue(targetField);
			var value;
			if (metric === 'count') {
				value = parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT'), 10);
			} else {
				value = parseFloat(ga.getAggregate(metric.toUpperCase(), valueField));
			}
			rows.push({
				source: this._blank(sVal),
				target: this._blank(tVal),
				value: isNaN(value) ? 0 : value
			});
		}
		return this._build(rows, cfg);
	},

	/**
	 * Reshape an array of plain objects into a Sankey graph.
	 * cfg: { sourceField, targetField, valueField, metric? (dup combine; default sum),
	 *        colors, prefixStages }
	 * Duplicate (source,target) pairs are combined (summed by default).
	 */
	fromRows: function (rows, cfg) {
		cfg = cfg || {};
		rows = rows || [];
		var sourceField = this._str(cfg.sourceField);
		var targetField = this._str(cfg.targetField);
		var valueField = this._str(cfg.valueField);

		var collected = [];
		for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
			var r = rows[i] || {};
			var value = parseFloat(this._readField(r, valueField));
			collected.push({
				source: this._blank(this._readField(r, sourceField)),
				target: this._blank(this._readField(r, targetField)),
				value: isNaN(value) ? 0 : value
			});
		}
		return this._build(collected, cfg, (this._str(cfg.metric) || 'sum').toLowerCase());
	},

	// ----- internals -------------------------------------------------------

	/**
	 * Build the { nodes, links } graph from flat rows {source, target, value}.
	 * dupMetric: how to combine duplicate (source,target) pairs (null = sum).
	 *
	 * prefixStages: when true, the SAME value appearing as both a source and a
	 * target is split into two distinct nodes by prefixing ("From: X" / "To: X").
	 * This is useful when stages can recur (e.g. a status that is both an origin
	 * and a destination) and you don't want a self-referential collapse. When
	 * false (default), source and target values that match become one shared node
	 * (the natural multi-stage flow).
	 */
	_build: function (rows, cfg, dupMetric) {
		var prefix = cfg.prefixStages === true || cfg.prefixStages === 'true';
		var srcLabel = function (v) { return prefix ? ('From: ' + v) : v; };
		var tgtLabel = function (v) { return prefix ? ('To: ' + v) : v; };
		var metric = dupMetric || 'sum';

		var nodeOrder = [];
		var nodeSeen = {};
		var addNode = function (name) {
			if (!nodeSeen[name]) { nodeSeen[name] = true; nodeOrder.push(name); }
		};

		var linkKeys = [];
		var linkMap = {};
		var linkCnt = {};
		for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
			var row = rows[i];
			var s = srcLabel(row.source);
			var t = tgtLabel(row.target);
			if (s === '(empty)' || t === '(empty)') { continue; }
			if (s === t) { continue; } // d3-sankey can't lay out a self-loop
			addNode(s);
			addNode(t);
			var key = s + '' + t;
			if (linkMap[key] === undefined) {
				linkMap[key] = row.value;
				linkCnt[key] = 1;
				linkKeys.push({ key: key, source: s, target: t });
			} else {
				if (metric === 'min') { linkMap[key] = Math.min(linkMap[key], row.value); }
				else if (metric === 'max') { linkMap[key] = Math.max(linkMap[key], row.value); }
				else { linkMap[key] += row.value; }
				linkCnt[key]++;
			}
		}
		if (metric === 'avg') {
			for (var k in linkMap) { if (linkMap.hasOwnProperty(k)) { linkMap[k] = linkMap[k] / linkCnt[k]; } }
		}

		var parsedColors = this._parseColors(cfg.colors);
		var nodes = [];
		for (var n = 0; n < nodeOrder.length; n++) {
			var entry = { name: String(nodeOrder[n]) };
			var color = this._colorFor(parsedColors, nodeOrder[n], n);
			if (color) { entry.color = color; }
			nodes.push(entry);
		}

		var links = [];
		for (var j = 0; j < linkKeys.length; j++) {
			var lk = linkKeys[j];
			var val = linkMap[lk.key];
			if (!val || val <= 0) { continue; } // drop zero/negative flows
			links.push({ source: String(lk.source), target: String(lk.target), value: val });
		}

		return { nodes: nodes, links: links };
	},

	_parseColors: function (colors) {
		if (!colors) { return null; }
		if (typeof colors === 'string') {
			var s = colors.replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, '');
			if (!s) { return null; }
			try {
				colors = JSON.parse(s);
			} catch (e) {
				colors = s.split(',');
				for (var i = 0; i < colors.length; i++) {
					colors[i] = colors[i].replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, '');
				}
			}
		}
		if (Object.prototype.toString.call(colors) === '[object Array]') {
			return { type: 'array', value: colors };
		}
		if (typeof colors === 'object') {
			return { type: 'map', value: colors };
		}
		return null;
	},

	_colorFor: function (parsed, label, index) {
		if (!parsed) { return null; }
		if (parsed.type === 'array') {
			if (!parsed.value.length) { return null; }
			return parsed.value[index % parsed.value.length];
		}
		if (parsed.type === 'map') {
			return parsed.value[label] || null;
		}
		return null;
	},

	_readField: function (obj, field) {
		if (!field) { return ''; }
		var v = obj[field];
		if (v && typeof v === 'object') {
			if (typeof v.getDisplayValue === 'function') { return v.getDisplayValue(); }
			if (v.displayValue !== undefined) { return v.displayValue; }
			if (v.value !== undefined) { return v.value; }
		}
		return (v === undefined || v === null) ? '' : v;
	},

	_str: function (v) {
		return (v === undefined || v === null) ? '' : ('' + v).replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, '');
	},

	_blank: function (v) {
		var s = (v === undefined || v === null) ? '' : ('' + v);
		return s === '' ? '(empty)' : s;
	},

	type: 'D3SankeyData'
};
]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-21 15:26:54</sys_created_on><sys_id>8dcafb2e932dc35051d7b1dcebba1076</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>D3SankeyData</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_8dcafb2e932dc35051d7b1dcebba1076</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-21 15:26:54</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_ux_data_broker_transform_91e937aa932dc35051d7b1dcebba1063
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_ux_data_broker_transform"><sys_ux_data_broker_transform action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><acl_failure_result/><api_name>global.D3 Sunburst Data</api_name><batch_exclude>false</batch_exclude><description/><mutates_server_data>false</mutates_server_data><name>D3 Sunburst Data</name><output_schema/><private>false</private><props>[
  {
    "name": "table",
    "label": "Table",
    "description": "Table to query, e.g. 'incident'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "mandatory": true,
    "defaultValue": "incident"
  },
  {
    "name": "filter",
    "label": "Filter (encoded query)",
    "description": "Optional encoded query to scope the rows, e.g. 'active=true'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "groupField",
    "label": "Group field (ring 1 — inner)",
    "description": "Field that forms the INNER ring (top-level branches), e.g. 'category'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "mandatory": true,
    "defaultValue": "category"
  },
  {
    "name": "categoryField",
    "label": "Category field (ring 2 — outer)",
    "description": "Field that forms the OUTER ring within each group, e.g. 'subcategory'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "mandatory": true,
    "defaultValue": "subcategory"
  },
  {
    "name": "metric",
    "label": "Metric",
    "description": "Aggregation for the leaves: count | sum | avg | min | max. Default 'count'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": "count"
  },
  {
    "name": "valueField",
    "label": "Value field",
    "description": "Numeric field to aggregate (required when metric is not 'count').",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "useDisplayValue",
    "label": "Use display values for labels",
    "description": "Label rings by display value (readable) instead of raw value.",
    "fieldType": "boolean",
    "defaultValue": true
  },
  {
    "name": "rootName",
    "label": "Root name",
    "description": "Name of the (hidden) root node / center of the sunburst.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": "All"
  },
  {
    "name": "colors",
    "label": "Colors (JSON)",
    "description": "Optional per-group colors for the inner ring: array [\"#2E93fA\",\"#66DA26\"] by order, or map {\"Hardware\":\"#2E93fA\"} keyed by group name. Deeper rings derive a lighter shade automatically.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "sort",
    "label": "Sort",
    "description": "Order slices: none (query order), label-asc, label-desc, value-asc, value-desc.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": "none"
  }
]
</props><required_translations/><schema_version>1.0.0</schema_version><script><![CDATA[function transform(input) {
	return new global.D3SliceData().fromHierarchy(input);
}
]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_ux_data_broker_transform</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-21 15:23:05</sys_created_on><sys_id>91e937aa932dc35051d7b1dcebba1063</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>D3 Sunburst Data</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_ux_data_broker_transform_91e937aa932dc35051d7b1dcebba1063</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-21 15:23:05</sys_updated_on></sys_ux_data_broker_transform><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=91e937aa932dc35051d7b1dcebba1063"/></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_ux_data_broker_transform_758efba2936dc35051d7b1dcebba1089
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_ux_data_broker_transform"><sys_ux_data_broker_transform action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><acl_failure_result/><api_name>global.D3 Wordcloud Data (Text)</api_name><batch_exclude>false</batch_exclude><description/><mutates_server_data>false</mutates_server_data><name>D3 Wordcloud Data (Text)</name><output_schema/><private>false</private><props>[
  {
    "name": "table",
    "label": "Table",
    "description": "Table whose records to read, e.g. 'incident'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "mandatory": true,
    "defaultValue": "incident"
  },
  {
    "name": "filter",
    "label": "Filter (encoded query)",
    "description": "Optional encoded query to scope the records, e.g. 'active=true^opened_atONLast 30 days@...'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "textField",
    "label": "Text field",
    "description": "Free-text field to tokenize and count, e.g. 'short_description' or 'description'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "mandatory": true,
    "defaultValue": "short_description"
  },
  {
    "name": "stopWords",
    "label": "Stop words",
    "description": "Extra words to ignore, in addition to the built-in English stop-word list. Comma-separated or a JSON array.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "minLength",
    "label": "Minimum word length",
    "description": "Ignore tokens shorter than this many characters. Default 3.",
    "fieldType": "number",
    "defaultValue": 3
  },
  {
    "name": "minCount",
    "label": "Minimum frequency",
    "description": "Only keep words that appear at least this many times. Default 1.",
    "fieldType": "number",
    "defaultValue": 2
  },
  {
    "name": "maxWords",
    "label": "Max words (top-N)",
    "description": "Optional limit: keep only the top-N most frequent words. Blank/0 = all.",
    "fieldType": "number",
    "defaultValue": 80
  },
  {
    "name": "caseInsensitive",
    "label": "Case insensitive",
    "description": "Lowercase words before counting so 'Network' and 'network' are merged.",
    "fieldType": "boolean",
    "defaultValue": true
  }
]
</props><required_translations/><schema_version>1.0.0</schema_version><script><![CDATA[function transform(input) {
	return new global.D3WordData().fromText(input);
}
]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_ux_data_broker_transform</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-21 15:43:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>758efba2936dc35051d7b1dcebba1089</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>D3 Wordcloud Data (Text)</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_ux_data_broker_transform_758efba2936dc35051d7b1dcebba1089</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-21 15:43:20</sys_updated_on></sys_ux_data_broker_transform><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=758efba2936dc35051d7b1dcebba1089"/></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_ux_data_broker_transform_5a0d33e2936dc35051d7b1dcebba109d
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_ux_data_broker_transform"><sys_ux_data_broker_transform action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><acl_failure_result/><api_name>global.D3 Treemap Data (Flat)</api_name><batch_exclude>false</batch_exclude><description/><mutates_server_data>false</mutates_server_data><name>D3 Treemap Data (Flat)</name><output_schema/><private>false</private><props>[
  {
    "name": "table",
    "label": "Table",
    "description": "Table to query, e.g. 'incident'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "mandatory": true,
    "defaultValue": "incident"
  },
  {
    "name": "filter",
    "label": "Filter (encoded query)",
    "description": "Optional encoded query to scope the rows, e.g. 'active=true^priority<=2'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "categoryField",
    "label": "Category field (tile)",
    "description": "Field whose values become the tiles (leaves), e.g. 'assignment_group' or 'priority'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "mandatory": true,
    "defaultValue": "category"
  },
  {
    "name": "groupField",
    "label": "Group field (optional parent)",
    "description": "Optional field to group tiles under a parent (builds a 2-level treemap), e.g. 'priority'. Blank = a single level of tiles.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "metric",
    "label": "Metric",
    "description": "Aggregation: count | sum | avg | min | max. Default 'count'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": "count"
  },
  {
    "name": "valueField",
    "label": "Value field",
    "description": "Numeric field to aggregate (required when metric is not 'count'), e.g. 'business_duration'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "useDisplayValue",
    "label": "Use display values for labels",
    "description": "Group/label by display value (readable) instead of raw value.",
    "fieldType": "boolean",
    "defaultValue": true
  },
  {
    "name": "colors",
    "label": "Colors (JSON)",
    "description": "Optional per-tile colors: a JSON array [\"#2E93fA\",\"#66DA26\"] applied by order, or a map {\"Hardware\":\"#2E93fA\"} keyed by tile label or group name. Sets each leaf's 'color'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "maxCategories",
    "label": "Max tiles (top-N)",
    "description": "Optional limit: keep only the top-N tiles by value. Blank = all.",
    "fieldType": "number"
  },
  {
    "name": "sort",
    "label": "Tile sort",
    "description": "Order tiles: none (query order), label-asc, label-desc, value-asc, value-desc. (The component can also re-sort via its own Sort property.)",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": "value-desc"
  }
]
</props><required_translations/><schema_version>1.0.0</schema_version><script><![CDATA[function transform(input) {
	return new global.D3HierarchyData().fromAggregate(input);
}
]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_ux_data_broker_transform</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-21 15:36:49</sys_created_on><sys_id>5a0d33e2936dc35051d7b1dcebba109d</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>D3 Treemap Data (Flat)</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_ux_data_broker_transform_5a0d33e2936dc35051d7b1dcebba109d</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-21 15:36:49</sys_updated_on></sys_ux_data_broker_transform><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=5a0d33e2936dc35051d7b1dcebba109d"/></record_update>

    {
        "defaultValue": null,
        "fieldType": "string",
        "interfaceApiName": "global.route",
        "label": "Route type",
        "name": "route",
        "type": "string",
        "valueType": "string"
    },
    {
        "defaultValue": null,
        "fieldType": "json",
        "interfaceApiName": "global.route",
        "label": "Route fields",

        "type": "json",
        "valueType": "string"
    },
    {

        "fieldType": "json",
        "interfaceApiName": "global.route",
        "label": "Optionals parameters",

        "type": "json",
        "valueType": "string"

    {

        "interfaceApiName": "global.route",
        "label": "Remove previous URL from browser history",

        "valueType": "string"

    {

        "valueType": "string"

        "label": "Title (advanced)",
        "name": "title",
        "type": "string",
        "valueType": "string"
    },
    {
        "defaultValue": null,

        "name": "multiInstField",
        "type": "string",
        "valueType": "string"
    },
    {
        "defaultValue": null,
        "description": "Entering \"current\" opens a record in a sub-tab",

        "name": "targetRoute",
        "type": "string",

    },
    {

        "type": "json",
        "typeMetadata": {
            "schema": {
                "properties": {
                    "target": {
                        "description": "Target window to open. Default is _blank",

                    "url": {

                "type": "object"

        "valueType": "string"
    },
    {

        "label": "Navigation Options object",

        "type": "json",

sys_update_xml.name: sys_ux_data_broker_transform_ee6e3726936dc35051d7b1dcebba1002
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_ux_data_broker_transform"><sys_ux_data_broker_transform action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><acl_failure_result/><api_name>global.D3 Wordcloud Data</api_name><batch_exclude>false</batch_exclude><description/><mutates_server_data>false</mutates_server_data><name>D3 Wordcloud Data</name><output_schema/><private>false</private><props>[
  {
    "name": "table",
    "label": "Table",
    "description": "Table to query, e.g. 'incident'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "mandatory": true,
    "defaultValue": "incident"
  },
  {
    "name": "filter",
    "label": "Filter (encoded query)",
    "description": "Optional encoded query to scope the rows, e.g. 'active=true^priority<=2'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "field",
    "label": "Group field",
    "description": "Field to group by; each distinct value becomes one word, e.g. 'category' or 'assignment_group'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "mandatory": true,
    "defaultValue": "category"
  },
  {
    "name": "metric",
    "label": "Metric",
    "description": "Aggregation that drives each word's weight: count | sum | avg | min | max. Default 'count'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": "count"
  },
  {
    "name": "valueField",
    "label": "Value field",
    "description": "Numeric field to aggregate (required when metric is not 'count'), e.g. 'business_duration'.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "useDisplayValue",
    "label": "Use display values for labels",
    "description": "Use the display value (readable) instead of the raw value for each word's text.",
    "fieldType": "boolean",
    "defaultValue": true
  },
  {
    "name": "maxWords",
    "label": "Max words (top-N)",
    "description": "Optional limit: keep only the top-N words by weight. Blank/0 = all.",
    "fieldType": "number"
  },
  {
    "name": "colors",
    "label": "Colors (JSON)",
    "description": "Optional per-word colors: a JSON array [\"#2E93fA\",\"#66DA26\"] applied by order, or a map {\"Network\":\"#66DA26\"} keyed by word text.",
    "fieldType": "string",
    "defaultValue": ""
  }
]
</props><required_translations/><schema_version>1.0.0</schema_version><script><![CDATA[function transform(input) {
	return new global.D3WordData().fromAggregate(input);
}
]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_ux_data_broker_transform</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-21 15:42:50</sys_created_on><sys_id>ee6e3726936dc35051d7b1dcebba1002</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>D3 Wordcloud Data</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_ux_data_broker_transform_ee6e3726936dc35051d7b1dcebba1002</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-21 15:42:50</sys_updated_on></sys_ux_data_broker_transform><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=ee6e3726936dc35051d7b1dcebba1002"/></record_update>
